***Experience with Adobe Illustrator (working with mockups and basic design skills) is required. If you don't have Adobe Illustrator experience, please don't apply.







The Role:

We are an embroidery and custom apparel shop in the U.S. We have a team already, and you'd be the newest addition. Your job is to service inbound warm leads looking for apparel that we will design for them (think hats, shirts, etc.).



You get to know the needs of the customer, get their requirements, and work with our design team to make mockups and make the sale. You then follow up and nurture leads effectively until you make the sale.



Basic design and Adobe skills are needed for this role. If that's not you, please don't apply.

title: High-Paying Instagram DM Setter (Experienced Only | US Hours | Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a highly experienced Instagram DM Setter who knows how to turn conversations into qualified leads and booked calls. If you’re sharp, proactive, and results-driven, this role is for you.



As our DM Setter, you’ll be responsible for managing Instagram conversations, engaging leads, and qualifying prospects for our offers. You’ll play a key role in driving revenue by booking high-quality calls.  



Requirements:

- Native English speaker (clear, natural communication)

- Willing to work US hours

- At least 1 year of experience DM setting

- Strong understanding of sales psychology and objection handling

- Ability to manage high-volume conversations without losing quality

- Organized, reliable, and results-driven



Responsibilities

- Respond to inbound and outbound Instagra
ssages

- Build rapport and qualify leads effectively

- Guide prospects toward booking calls

- Maintain organized tracking of conversations and leads

- Collaborate with the team to improve scripts and performance



Perks:

*Well-paid position (above market for the right candidate)

*You can work as much as you want. I will pay you a salary, but if you work extra hours, you will get paid.

*Flexible Vacation, if you need time off, just let me know.

*Opportunity to advance/get bonuses. If you do a good job, I will give you a raise and bonuses.

 here]”

Additionally, please list any and all other software / apps / programs you are proficient in: Scale 1-10





Company Background

Established in 1984, PTFS, LLC is a commercial services company headquartered in Houston TX. Some of our clients have been longstanding customers of ours for over 40 years. We are extremely data driven and we use Excel heavily for most of our data metrics. We also use Quickbooks Online Advanced for Accounting among others. We utilize the spreadsheet sync function in QBO advanced, and we rely on many of the reports both standard & customized in QBO advanced to make informed decisions. 



We are in process of building a fully remote team in the PH which will eventually take over all US based operations. We are looking for tea
mbers LONG TERM. We value loyalty and tenure-ship and most importantly, availability. We would like all of the tea
mbers we bring onboard to retire with us. We are firm believers that everybody working here deserves the opportunity to grow. Everyone will have a clear understanding of the trajectory of their career path with us. After 1 year, every tea
mber will go through the process of performance review determining promotion / increase in compensation. The metrics we use are:



- Improved understanding of company processes 

- Thoroughness & speed in taking proper actions 

- Frequency of errors / how individual has corrected them

- New responsibilities assumed since hire

- Dependency & Availability

- Does the individual go above & beyond? 

- Is the individual eager to take the lead in any situation?

- Does the individual possess other skills helpful to the company? 



Our line of work is very fast paced with ever-changing requests from clients. Schedules are set but can change at any given 
nt. It is important for tea
mbers to understand what needs to be done when a sudden change is requested by a customer as there are field workers who are dependent on the office to communicate such changes.  As a tea
mber, we need you to be versatile, stepping up or filling in at any given 
nt if another tea
mber is busy or unavailable. Thus, we don't have a separation of duties. Each tea
mber must be able to do EVERYTHING

title: AI Animated Video Creator (Long-Term Gig Role)
description:
We are looking for a talented AI Animated Video Creator to join our team on a long-term gig basis. This is not just a one-off freelance project. We want someone we can work with consistently — a reliable creative partner who becomes a fixed part of our content workflow.



About the role:

- You will create short animated videos using AI tools and creative editing skills.

- The videos are usually based on health/wellness-style educational content, explainer content, or social media storytelling.

- We are looking for someone who can take a script or idea and turn it into an engaging, polished animated video.



What you’ll do:

- Create short-form animated videos using AI tools

- Turn scripts, prompts, or rough concepts into compelling visual content

- Generate scenes, motion, characters, backgrounds, and visual storytelling elements

- Edit and assemble videos for social media platforms

- Add subtitles, sound effects, music, pacing, and transitions where needed

- Keep a consistent visual quality and style across videos

- Deliver content on time and communicate clearly with the team

- Improve workflows and suggest better tools or creative ideas when useful



What we’re looking for:

- Experience creating AI-generated animated videos

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, and visual flow

- Ability to use AI video and design tools efficiently

 - Good editing skills for short-form content

- Strong eye for quality, detail, and audience engagement

- Reliable communication and consistent delivery

- Open to long-term collaboration

- Able to follow brand direction, but also bring creative input



Tools / skills that are a plus

Experience with tools such as:

- Runway

- Pika

- Midjourney

- Kling

- CapCut

- Premiere Pro

- After Effects

- ChatGPT or other AI prompting tools



You do not need to use all of these, but you should already be comfortable working with modern AI content tools.



Type of content



Most videos will be:

- Short-form social media videos

- Explainer-style videos

- Animated educational videos

- AI-enhanced storytelling content



What matters most



We care about:

- Quality

- Speed

- Creativity

- Reliability



Long-term fit

- We are not looking for someone who disappears after one task.

- We want someone dependable who can grow with our team and become our go-to person for this type of content.



Payment / setup:

- Gig-based / per project or per video

- Ongoing work for the right person

- Potential for steady weekly volume

- Long-term collaboration preferred



To apply



Please send:

- A short introduction about yourself

- Examples of animated videos you made with AI

- The tools you use

- Your rate per video or per project

- Your turnaround time

- Your favorite type of AI video work



Please include the word “ANIMATE” in your application so we know you read the full post.

title: Ecommerce video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video / per concept

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



Highly valued skills:

- Graphic design experience. A strong eye for statics, headlines, and layouts. Experience making static ads that convert

- AI UGC: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Nano Banana

Candidates with either of these skill sets will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. No guarantees, no rushing. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The real opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have static ad / graphic design experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

title: Customer Service VA (Shopify / E-commerce) – Emails & FB Comments – Part-Time Daily
description:
Job Description:



We are a fast-growing UK-based e-commerce brand in the oral care space, and we’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Service VA to handle daily customer support.



You will be responsible for replying to customer
s and 
ments/messages in a clear, calm, and professional tone.



This is a long-term role for someone who is proactive, sharp, and understands how to communicate with customers effectively.



Working Hours (IMPORTANT):



You will work 3 times per day, 45 minutes each session:



6:00 AM (Philippines time)

11:00 AM (Philippines time)

7:00 PM (Philippines time)



Total: ~2 hours 15 minutes per day



You must be available at these exact times.



Pay:



$4.00/hour

Approx. $270/month



Your Responsibilities:



Respond to customer
s (order issues, tracking, etc.)

Reply to 
ments and messages

Check tracking links and provide updates

Handle common issues such as:

“Where is my order?”

Delivery delays

Missing or incorrect items

Use ChatGPT to assist replies, but edit for natural tone

Follow our SOP and response framework exactly



Requirements (IMPORTANT):



Must have experience with Shopify

Must have worked with 6 or 7 figure e-commerce brands

Strong written English (natural, human tone)

Must be confident using ChatGPT / AI tools

Reliable internet and punctuality is critical

Must follow instructions precisely



What We Are Looking For:



Someone who understands customer psychology (not just copy/paste)

Can stay calm with frustrated customers

High attention to detail

Can think independently when needed

???? APPLICATION PROCESS (VERY IMPORTANT)



To apply, you MUST complete all steps below:



1. Send:

E-commerce brands you’ve worked with

Your exact role in customer service

2. Review the Scenario Document:



We’ve created a document with 20 real customer service scenarios that we deal with daily:





Please read through all scenarios carefully.



3. Record a Loom Video (MAIN TASK):

Turn your camera ON

Record yourself answering the scenarios in the document

Speak as if you are replying to real customers



Important:



Do NOT read from a script

Do NOT copy/paste AI responses

We want to see how you think and communicate

Keep your tone calm, clear, and professional



This is the most important part of the application.



4. Submit:

Your Loom video link

Your Google Doc answers (if used for prep)



Important Notes:



Robotic or AI-only answers will be rejected

Applications without a Loom video will not be considered

This is a long-term role



Bonus (Not Required):



Experience with Gorgias / Zendesk

Experience handling 
ments

Experience with shipping/logistics issues



Final Step:

Start your application with: “BrightSmile”

(Applications without this will be ignored)

mber to help build and scale a strong personal brand on TikTok.

title: Virtual Assistant for Dental Equipment E-commerce
description:
We are seeking a proactive and organized Virtual Assistant to handle the setup and maintenance of our Shopify website, manage incoming calls, process orders, support SEO initiatives, assist with social media marketing, and help coordinate the CEO's calendar and meetings. The ideal candidate should have a strong background in e-commerce, excellent communication skills, and a commitment to providing exceptional customer service.



Key Responsibilities:



- Shopify Website Management:



- Set up and optimize our Shopify website for a user-friendly shopping experience.



- Regularly update product listings, prices, and promotions.



- Ensure website functionality, troubleshoot issues, and implement improvements.



- Customer Support:



- Handle incoming customer inquiries via phone,
, and chat.



- Provide prompt and accurate information to customers regarding products, orders, and payments.



- Order Management:



- Process customer orders accurately and efficiently; oversee transfer of orders for pick and shipping.



- Manage the order fulfillment process, ensuring timely delivery and communication with customers.



- Payment Processing:



- Ensure all transactions are completed smoothly through the Stripe banking system.



- Monitor account activity, troubleshoot payment issues, and provide support to customers as needed.



- SEO Support:



- Implement SEO best practices to boost website visibility and organic traffic.



- Conduct keyword research and optimize website content accordingly.



- Social Media Marketing:



- Assist in creating and scheduling engaging content for our social media platforms.



- Monitor social media interactions and respond to followers in a timely manner.



- CEO Calendar Management:



- Manage the CEO’s calendar and schedule appointments, ensuring efficient use of time.



- Provide daily updates to the CEO regarding important tasks, meetings, and client interactions.



- Meeting Coordination:



- Create and organize programs for weekly meetings with potential clients.



- Gather relevant information and prepare materials for meetings to ensure productive discussions.



Qualifications:



- Previous experience in e-commerce, preferably with Shopify.



- Familiarity with Stripe or similar payment processing systems.



- Basic knowledge of SEO practices and social media marketing strategies.



- Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.



- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.



- Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively.



- Proficient in using various computer applications and online tools.



- Customer-focused mindset and a desire to provide outstanding service.



What We Offer:



- Competitive salary based on experience.



- Flexible working hours. Some overlap with Central Time USA for communications with the CEO



- Opportunity to grow with our business and build your skills in e-commerce, SEO, and digital marketing, meeting setting, group zoo
eting growth.



- Supportive and collaborative work environment.

title: Tier 2 Helpdesk Technician
description:
Position Summary



We are a small managed service provider (MSP) looking for a Helpdesk Technician who can own the full support lifecycle — from first-contact triage through advanced troubleshooting — across our client base. You’ll be the primary point of contact for end users, handling everything from password resets and printer issues to Microsoft 365 administration, network diagnostics, and server-level troubleshooting. Because we’re a small team, you’ll wear many hats, work directly with clients, and have real impact on how we deliver service.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Front-Line Support



• Answer incoming calls,
s, and tickets; log all requests accurately in the PSA/ticketing system (Superops)

• Perform initial triage — gather symptoms, identify urgency, and resolve straightforward issues on first contact when possible

• Handle common requests: password resets, MFA setup, account unlocks, new-user onboarding/offboarding,
 and calendar issues, printer troubleshooting, and basic software installs

• Walk end users through solutions clearly and patiently, adapting communication style to non-technical audiences

Advanced Troubleshooting

• Troubleshoot complex workstation, laptop, and peripheral issues across Windows 10/11 and macOS environments

• Administer and maintain Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, Microsoft 365 tenants, and Group Policy across multiple client environments

• Diagnose network connectivity problems including DNS, DHCP, VPN, Wi-Fi, firewall rules, and switching/routing basics

• Support and maintain RMM tools (Superops) for monitoring, patching, and remote access

• Investigate recurring issues, perform root-cause analysis, and implement lasting fixes rather than repeated band-aids

• Assist with server administration tasks: reboots, service restarts, disk space management, backup verification, and basic Hyper-V/VMware operations

• Support cloud platforms and SaaS applications common to the client base (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, line-of-business apps)



MSP Operations



• Manage and prioritize your own ticket queue across multiple clients, meeting or exceeding SLA response and resolution targets

• Create and maintain client-specific documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base articles in the company documentation platform (Hudu)

• Participate in onboarding new clients — inventorying assets, documenting environments, and setting up monitoring and management tools

• Coordinate with vendors and third-party providers when escalation beyond our scope is needed

• Assist with project work as needed: workstation deployments, migrations, network upgrades, and office moves

• Contribute to improving internal processes, automation, and service delivery quality



Required Qualifications



• Excellent English Language Skills, both written and verbal

• 2+ years of hands-on IT support experience; MSP experience strongly preferred

• Solid working knowledge of Windows 10/11, macOS, Microsoft 365 administration, and Active Directory / Azure AD

• Understanding of networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN, VLANs, and basic firewall concepts

• Experience with a PSA or ticketing system and an RMM platform

• Ability to manage multiple client environments and context-switch effectively throughout the day

• Strong communication skills — comfortable speaking directly with clients ranging from small business owners to office staff

• Self-motivated and able to work independently; you won’t always have someone looking over your shoulder



Preferred Qualifications



• Industry certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft 365 Certified

• Experience with endpoint management tools (Intune, Jamf)

• Familiarity with scripting or automation (PowerShell, Bash, or Python)

• Experience supporting backup and disaster recovery solutions (Datto, Veeam, Acronis)

• Exposure to basic security concepts: EDR tools,
 filtering, security awareness training platforms

title: DIRECT RESPONSE VSL EDITOR
description:
We are looking for a high-speed, high-output Direct Response VSL Editor to join our team. We provide the scripts; you provide the visual storytelling, pacing, and "pattern interrupts" that keep viewers glued to the screen.



This isn't about making "pretty" videos—it's about making videos that convert.



### Key Responsibilities

Content Sourcing: You must be an expert at finding high-quality b-roll, stock footage, and relevant 
s/clips that align perfectly with our scripts.



High-Impact Editing: Mastery of pacing, sound design, and text overlays to maximize retention.



Direct Response Focus: Understanding when to use fast cuts versus when to let a point breathe based on the sales psychology of the script.



Speed & Reliability: This is a full-time role. We move fast, and we expect a high volume of quality output without constant hand-holding.



### Requirements

Proven Portfolio: You must show previous VSL or high-retention social media work.



Software Mastery: Expert level in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or After Effects.



The "Vibe" Check: Ability to match the visual style to different niches and audiences.



Efficiency: Ability to turn around long-form VSLs (10–30 mins) quickly.



### ?? Our Hiring Process

We do not hire based on portfolios alone. We value real-world execution over a highlight reel. Our process is:



Portfolio Review: We check your past work.



The Test Task: If your portfolio passes, we will send you a test script segment. You will be required to source the footage and edit it to show us your style and speed.



Interview & Hire: If the test task hits our standards, we move to a full-time offer.



### How to Apply

Please send your portfolio link and a brief summary of your experience with Direct Response. Use the subject line: "Fast VSL Editor Ready for Test Task."

title: TECHNICAL SUPPORT ENGINEER (INTEGRATIONS, QA, APIs) - US HOURS | G2 AWARD-WINNING US COMPANY
description:
Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | Long-Term Role



You’re not looking to gig hop — you’re looking to build a career with a high-performing US-based team.



If you’re strong at troubleshooting, clear communication, and taking ownership, this role will feel right.



We’re hiring a Technical Support Engineer to help us solve real problems, improve systems, and grow into deeper technical responsibility over time.



We’re hiring a Technical Support Engineer to help us:



* resolve real customer issues

* improve QA and release confidence

* support go-lives and integrations

* reduce unnecessary interruptions to development

* strengthen how support, operations, and development work together



This is not entry-level support.

This is not a pure QA role.

This is not a junior developer role.



This is a hands-on technical role for someone who can work through ambiguity, think clearly, and move problems toward resolution without constant direction.



You do not need to be a full software engineer. But you do need to be comfortable with technical systems, structured data, debugging, and learning fast.



This role is a strong fit for someone from:



* technical support

* implementation support

* support engineering

* QA

* technical operations



ABOUT TOKEN OF TRUST



Token of Trust is a G2-recognized, award-winning platform that helps regulated ecommerce businesses verify consumer identities and comply with excise tax and reporting requirements.



We operate at the intersection of ecommerce, compliance, and trust — solving real-world problems for businesses that cannot afford to get it wrong.



We are a small, high-performing team. We value ownership, focus, continuous improvement, and delivering real results.



We are building a company where strong contributors can grow into deeper technical ownership over time — not just do a job, but become increasingly valuable as the company scales.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN



Technical Support Leadership (Primary Focus)



You will become the primary technical support person assigned to the Operations team for issues that require real troubleshooting discipline.



You will:



* triage, reproduce, and drive resolution of technical support issues

* distinguish between user error, configuration issues, integration problems, and product defects

* gather the right evidence before escalating to Development

* build and improve technical support playbooks so recurring issues can be delegated effectively

* personally drive challenging, ambiguous, or business-critical technical issues to closure

* communicate clearly with customers and internal teams during investigations

* become the trusted technical point of contact for operational issues that require strong judgment



QA and Release Confidence



You will be among the first to test new features and functionality so we can catch issues earlier and release with greater confidence.



You will:



* execute regression testing on key product flows

* write clean, reproducible bug reports with useful technical detail

* validate fixes before production release

* help reduce production surprises through disciplined testing and clear coverage

* build confidence that new functionality works across important use cases

* over time, help automate portions of regression testing and release validation



Go-Lives and Integration Enablement



You will help bring clients live successfully and, over time, act as the technical point person on go-lives and integration efforts.



You will:



* assist with client go-lives and implementation tasks

* configure plugins and integrations across platforms such as WordPress, WooCommerce, Shopify, and BigCommerce

* in some cases, make small technical customizations such as WordPress hooks, lightweight scripting, or small amounts of injected JavaScript

* participate in screen-share sessions with customers

* inspect settings, payloads, API behavior, and structured data to identify setup or integration issues

* over time, lead go-lives independently using well-understood technical playbooks, including cases that require light customization



Automation and Structured Operations



As the role grows, you will help identify and close the missing pieces required to automate chunks of workflow and make operations more efficient, less error-prone, and easier to diagnose.



You will:



* work with JSON, YAML, CSV, and other structured data used in our systems and processes

* use APIs, logs, internal tools, and technical artifacts to investigate issues and confirm behavior

* build or maintain light scripts, prompts, checklists, and internal artifacts that make the team more effective

* help codify recurring troubleshooting, QA, and go-live patterns so the organization gets stronger over time

* identify repetitive manual work, unclear handoffs, and avoidable sources of error, then help structure better ways of working

* contribute to a longer-term path into deeper technical operations, QA automation, or development-support work



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THE FIRST 90 DAYS



* technical issues are reproduced more quickly and escalated more cleanly

* known issues are increasingly handled through clear playbooks rather than repeated ad hoc investigation

* QA catches issues earlier

* go-lives become smoother

* Development spends less time on preventable support interruptions

* leadership is pulled into emergency situations less often because problems are identified sooner and clients are kept informed earlier

* repetitive operational work starts getting documented, structured, or automated



REQUIREMENTS



* strong written and spoken English

* availability to work 8 hours per day within US hours, with US Central overlap required

* experience in technical support, Level 2+ support, QA, implementation, or a similar troubleshooting-heavy role

* familiarity with ecommerce systems (e.g. WordPress/WooCommerce, Shopify, and/or BigCommerce)

* strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

* comfort working with JSON, YAML, CSV, and other structured technical information

* comfort reading API documentation and inspecting request/response behavior

* ability to write clear bug reports, technical notes, escalation summaries, and playbooks

* strong follow-through and self-direction

* reliable internet and a professional video-call environment

* familiarity using AI tools for drafting, analysis, or structured work, along with the judgment to verify correctness



PREFERRED



* experience using browser dev tools, Postman, curl, or similar debugging tools

* basic JavaScript, Python, PHP, or scripting ability

* experience validating integrations, webhooks, configuration, or data mappings

* experience with regression testing or QA process discipline



COMPENSATION



* starting at $900 to $1,200 USD per month depending on experience, hours, and demonstrated technical ability

* paid trial project before full offer

* long-term position



We are not trying to be the highest-paying listing for this type of role.



We are trying to be one of the best long-term opportunities for someone who wants to grow, take ownership, and become increasingly valuable to the team.



This role qualifies for our Growth and Incentive Program, where strong performance can lead to performance bonuses and permanent compensation increases as the company grows.



We also have a culture of continuous improvement. People who raise standards, build better playbooks, reduce repeat issues, improve workflows, increase automation, and make the company more effective can earn greater trust, responsibility, and upside over time.



We reward people who take ownership, raise standards, and deliver consistent results.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



This is not a ticket-processing role.



You will not be judged only by how many tickets you touch.



You will be valued for:



* solving real problems

* improving how the company operates

* reducing repeated issues

* creating clarity

* building systems and playbooks that scale



For the right person, this is a real growth path — not just a support seat.



Over time, strong performance here can grow into:



* deeper QA ownership

* more responsibility for go-lives and technical implementations

* support workflow automation

* technical operations leadership

* selected development-adjacent work



HOW TO APPLY



We take hiring seriously because we are protective of our high-performing team and this is a long-term role. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



It is okay to use AI to help organize or polish your application. In fact, we expect you to. But your answers must still reflect your own experience, judgment, and thinking.



To confirm that you read this posting carefully, start your application with this exact phrase:



I Raise the Bar.



Please include all of the following:



1. Availability

   Your exact US-hours availability, including your time zone and working hours.



2. Ownership story

   In 5 to 8 sentences, describe one real technical support, QA, or integration issue you owned end-to-end. Tell us what happened, what you did, how you approached it, and what the outcome was.



3. Technical triage response

   Respond to this scenario:



A customer reports that checkout verification is failing for most users on their live site, but the team cannot reproduce it in staging.



Please include:



* what you would check first

* the clarifying questions you would ask

* the likely categories of root cause you would consider

* what you would communicate back to the team or customer next



We read every serious application carefully.



If you take ownership, solve problems, communicate clearly, and want to grow, we would like to hear from you.

title: TIer 1 Helpdesk Technician
description:
Position Summary



We are a small managed service provider (MSP) looking for a Tier 1 Helpdesk Technician to serve as the first point of contact for our clients’ end users. You’ll handle incoming support requests, resolve common issues on first contact, and ensure that more complex problems are clearly documented and escalated to senior technicians. Because we’re a small team, you’ll interact directly with clients, learn quickly across multiple environments, and play a key role in delivering a great support experience.



Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Front-Line Support



• Answer incoming calls,
s, and tickets; log all requests accurately in the PSA/ticketing system (Superops)

• Perform initial triage — gather symptoms, identify urgency, and resolve straightforward issues on first contact when possible

• Handle common requests: password resets, MFA setup, account unlocks, new-user onboarding/offboarding,
 and calendar issues, printer troubleshooting, and basic software installs

• Walk end users through solutions clearly and patiently, adapting communication style to non-technical audiences

• Ensure tickets are thoroughly documented with symptoms, steps taken, and resolution or escalation notes before closing or handing off



Basic Troubleshooting



• Troubleshoot common workstation, laptop, and peripheral issues across Windows 10/11 and macOS environments

• Perform basic user account management in Active Directory and Microsoft 365 (password resets, group membership changes, license assignment)

• Diagnose straightforward network connectivity problems such as Wi-Fi issues, VPN connection failures, and basic DNS troubleshooting

• Use RMM tools (Superops) to run remote sessions, push basic scripts, and verify patch status

• Follow existing SOPs and knowledge base articles to resolve known issues consistently

Escalation and Communication

• Recognize when an issue exceeds Tier 1 scope and escalate promptly with clear, detailed notes to Tier 2 or senior technicians

• Communicate status updates to end users on open tickets, keeping clients informed throughout the resolution process

• Flag recurring issues or patterns to senior staff so root-cause analysis can be initiated



MSP Operations



• Manage and prioritize your own ticket queue across multiple clients, meeting or exceeding SLA response targets

• Contribute to and maintain client-specific documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base articles in the company documentation platform (Hudu)

• Assist with basic onboarding tasks for new clients — inventorying assets, documenting user lists, and setting up monitoring agents

• Coordinate with vendors and third-party providers for basic account or service inquiries when directed

• Assist senior technicians with project work as needed: workstation imaging, peripheral setup, and on-site support



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS



•      Excellent English Language Skills, both written and verbal

•	1+ year of hands-on IT support experience (helpdesk, desktop support, or internship); MSP exposure is a plus

•	Basic working knowledge of Windows 10/11, macOS, and Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint)

•	Familiarity with Active Directory basics: password resets, account unlocks, group membership

•	General understanding of networking concepts: IP addressing, DNS, DHCP, Wi-Fi, and VPN connectivity

•	Experience using a ticketing or helpdesk system in a professional setting

•	Strong communication skills — comfortable speaking directly with clients ranging from small business owners to office staff

•	Ability to manage multiple open tickets and context-switch effectively throughout the day

•	Self-motivated, dependable, and eager to learn; you’ll receive mentorship but should be comfortable taking initiative



Preferred Qualifications

•	CompTIA A+ certification (or actively pursuing)

•	Experience working in an MSP or multi-client environment

•	Familiarity with an RMM platform (Superops, ConnectWise, Datto, NinjaOne, or similar)

•	Exposure to basic Microsoft 365 administration (user/license management, mailbox troubleshooting)

•	Interest in networking, security, or cloud technologies and a desire to grow into more advanced roles

•	Experience with documentation tools or knowledge base platforms

title: Medical/Health Copywriter - Blog Article Review (Supplement Brand)
description:
We're a cognitive performance brand looking for an experienced medical/health copywriter to review and edit pre-written blog articles about supplements, nootropics, sleep, focus, and wellness.



The Work:

  - Review blog articles in Microsoft Word using Track Changes

  - Ensure the writing sounds natural, compelling, and human - not like AI-generated content. If a sentence sounds robotic, generic, or formulaic, rewrite it.

  - Check for medical compliance (no "treat/cure/prevent" claims - we're a dietary supplement)

  - Fix factual inaccuracies, awkward phrasing, and grammar issues

  - Improve weak hooks, flat transitions, and sections that feel like filler

  - Ensure consistent brand voice: think "Harvard neuroscientist writing for GQ" - smart, direct, authoritative, but never preachy or salesy

  - Do NOT rewrite full articles or change structure - edit at the sentence and paragraph level



What We're Looking For in Edits:

  - Does every paragraph earn its place? Cut filler.

  - Does the opening hook grab you in the first two sentences?

  - Are claims backed by the sources cited in the article?

  - Would you actually want to read this? If a section is boring, fix it.

  - Does it sound like a real expert wrote it, or does it sound like a content mill?



Details:

  - Articles are provided as Word docs with detailed review instructions included

  - We'll start with a paid trial batch of 25 articles

  - If the quality is good, there are 650+ additional articles to review

  - Each article is 1,500-2,000 words

  - Topics include: magnesium/sleep, caffeine alternatives, nootropic supplements, nicotine pouch comparisons, ADHD/focus, anxiety, productivity



Ideal Candidate:

  - Experience writing or editing health/supplement/wellness content

  - Strong editorial instincts - you can tell when writing sounds "off" or AI-generated

  - Understands FDA dietary supplement labeling rules (what you can and can't claim)

  - Strong English grammar and editing skills

  - Comfortable using Track Changes in Microsoft Word

  - Attention to detail - we need quality, not speed



To Apply:

  Please include a sample of health/supplement content you've written or edited, and briefly describe your experience with medical/health compliance in content.

You will be responsible for finding winning products, researching competitors, building and optimizing stores, using AI tools to create and test content, supporting paid ads, and helping manage day-to-day store operations.

Analyze top competitors, top creatives, top offers, and market trends

Recommend which products should be tested as affiliate products, owned-store products, or both

Build and improve Shopify stores, product pages, and collections

Create or coordinate basic visual brand assets such as logos, banners, thumbnails, and page layouts

Write product descriptions, landing page copy, hooks, scripts, and ad copy

Use AI tools for ideation, scripting, image generation, video generation, editing support, workflow automation, and creative testing

Build SOPs and improve systems over time

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager

title: Amazon sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: WHMCS Developer + WordPress Integration Specialist
description:
We are looking for a skilled WHMCS developer / technical assistant to help improve, maintain, and customize our WHMCS environment for a hosting-related business.



This role includes technical support with WHMCS updates, client area customization, theme development, security improvements, spam reduction, system setup, integrations, and linking WHMCS with our WordPress website.



We need someone who understands both the technical side and the user experience side of WHMCS. Ideally, this person can help us create a smoother and more professional system for both admin operations and client-facing workflows.



This is not just basic admin work. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, troubleshoot issues, recommend solutions, and implement improvements.



Responsibilities



You may help with some or all of the following:



Update and maintain WHMCS safely

Review current WHMCS setup and identify improvements

Customize WHMCS themes, templates, and client area pages

Create or modify a WHMCS theme to better match our brand

Improve user experience in the client area and other customer-facing areas

Help connect and streamline WHMCS with WordPress

Advise on the best structure for using WordPress for front-end marketing pages while WHMCS handles billing, services, support, and account functions

Assist with WHMCS integration with WHM/cPanel and related hosting systems

Set up, improve, or troubleshoot product/service automation

Review plugins, modules, and integrations to determine the best solutions

Recommend whether certain needs should be solved with a plugin, existing feature, custom code, or process change

Improve security and general system hygiene within the WHMCS environment

Help reduce or stop spam, especially in the ticketing/support system

Review
 piping, support departments, ticket submission flow, and spam protections

Help implement best practices for forms, access, validation, and abuse prevention

Troubleshoot errors, conflicts, update issues, and integration issues

Document important changes and recommendations clearly

Communicate in plain language, not only technical language

Ideal Skills / Experience



We are looking for someone with strong experience in:



WHMCS development and administration

WHMCS template/theme customization

PHP

MySQL / database understanding

HTML, CSS, JavaScript

WHM/cPanel integration

domain/hosting billing workflows

automation and provisioning in WHMCS

WordPress development and integration

API/integration work

spam prevention and security best practices

troubleshooting third-party modules/plugins

staging / backup / safe deployment practices

Nice to Have



These are a plus, but not required:



experience with hosting/reseller environments

experience with support/ticket system optimization

experience improving WHMCS client UX

familiarity with server/security concepts

experience connecting WHMCS to branded front-end websites

experience with custom hooks, overrides, and module troubleshooting

What We Need From You



When applying, please include:



A short summary of your WHMCS experience

How many years you have worked with WHMCS

Examples of WHMCS projects you have worked on

Whether you have customized WHMCS themes or client areas before

Whether you have experience integrating WHMCS with WordPress

Whether you have worked with WHM/cPanel integration and hosting automation

Your experience reducing spam in WHMCS ticket systems or forms

Your experience improving WHMCS security

What parts of this project you feel most confident handling

What parts you would want to review first before making recommendations

Links, screenshots, case studies, GitHub, or portfolio examples if available

Your hourly rate or project rate

Your typical availability and turnaround time

Whether you are comfortable starting with an audit/review and then moving into implementation

Please Also Answer These Questions



To help us evaluate your fit, please answer the following:



If a WHMCS ticket system is receiving a high amount of spam, what are the first things you would check?

How would you d
 whether to use a plugin/module, existing WHMCS functionality, or custom development?

What is your approach to safely updating and customizing WHMCS without breaking the system?

Have you ever connected a WordPress front-end with WHMCS for a better customer journey? If so, explain your approach.

What would you review first in a WHMCS environment that needs better organization, security, and user experience?

Why We’re Hiring



We want to improve the quality, security, and structure of our WHMCS environment and build a more polished system for both internal operations and the customer experience.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable technical resource and help us make smart long-term decisions, not just quick fixes.



Important



Please do not apply if your experience is mostly general virtual assistant work and you do not have real WHMCS hands-on technical experience.



We are specifically looking for someone who has actually worked inside WHMCS environments and can confidently handle customization, integrations, troubleshooting, and improvement planning.

title: Video Editor & Graphic Designer (Pet Brand | Full-Time | Remote)
description:
Are you a creative powerhouse who loves pets and crafting scroll-stopping ads?

We’re a fast-scaling pet e-commerce brand looking for a full-time A-player Video Editor & Graphic Designer to join our growing creative team.



We’re not just looking for someone who can edit videos — we want someone obsessed with creating the best ads on the internet. Someone who lives and breathes creativity, constantly pushes boundaries, and uses cutting-edge tools to bring ideas to life.



???? About Us



We’re a tight-knit, fast-growing team that truly values each of our members. Everyone here plays an important role, and we believe in rewarding you for the company’s growth.

When we win, you win.



We’re scaling quickly and looking for another talented video editor to join our creative family — someone who can match our passion, pace, and drive for excellence.



???? What You’ll Do



1. Edit world-class video ads: Turn provided scripts, footage, and assets into high-performing, scroll-stopping ads for
, Instagram, and TikTok.



2. Blend creativity with performance: Your videos should make people stop scrolling and drive measurable sales.



3. Add motion graphics & 3D magic: Use animations, captions, and 3D elements to explain product benefits in a visually engaging way.



4. Leverage AI tools daily: Runway, Sora, Midjourney, VEO — whatever helps you push creative limits and move faster.



5. Stay ahead of trends: Research what’s working in the pet and e-commerce space, bring new ad ideas weekly, and experiment relentlessly.



6. Collaborate & own: You’ll work closely with our copywriters and marketing team but will have full ownership of your projects — from concept to final edit.



???? What We’re Looking For



1. A-Player Mentality: You’re in the top 10% of your field. You take initiative, go beyond what’s asked, and focus on results, not just tasks.



2. Proven E-Commerce Experience: You’ve created high-performing e-commerce or DTC video ads that convert. (Pet niche experience is a plus!)



3. Expert Video Skills: Proficiency in Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Final Cut, or similar. Strong eye for motion design and visual storytelling.



4. 3D + Motion Graphics: Ability to integrate dynamic visuals that elevate creative quality and performance.



5. AI Fluency: You actively use creative AI tools — Runway, Midjourney, Sora, VEO, etc. — to innovate and work smarter.



6. Results-Driven Mindset: You care about performance. You measure your work by engagement, CTR, and conversions.



7. Ownership: You treat the business as your own. You think ahead, fix problems before they’re raised, and constantly look to improve.



8. Team Spirit: You thrive in a close, collaborative environment. You value feedback, communication, and growing alongside other A-players.



???? Why Join Us



1. Tight-Knit Culture: You’ll be joining a small, passionate, and supportive team that truly values each other. We celebrate wins together and back each other up when things get tough.



2. Rewarded for Growth: When the company grows, you grow — financially and professionally. We reward contributions that move the business forward.



3. Fast-Paced Growth: We’re scaling quickly, which means more opportunities for leadership, creative direction, and long-term growth.



4. Freedom to Create: We believe in hiring A-players and giving them the space to shine. If you have an idea and it makes sense — you’ll have the freedom to make it happen.



5. Cutting-Edge Tools: You’ll have access to the latest creative tools and AI technology to help you work efficiently and stay ahead of trends.



6. Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere — we care about impact, not hours.



???? How to Apply

Please include the following when applying:



1. Portfolio: Showcase your e-commerce video ads, especially those that performed well. Highlight any pet-related work if you have it.

2. AI Tools: Mention which AI tools you’ve mastered and how you use them in your creative process.

3. Preferred Monthly Salary (USD): This is a full-time position — we only hire on a monthly basis, not hourly.

4. Availability: When you can start and your location/time zone.

5. Create me a loom video explaining why you think you'd be fit for this role. 



If you’re a results-driven creative who wants to grow fast, work with a team that truly values you, and produce some of the best ads online — this is your chance.

Join us, and let’s build something amazing together.

title: WordPress Web Developer (Wellness Brand)
description:
About Us



We are a wellness-focused pet care company redefining daycare, boarding, and grooming through a holistic approach. We don't just provide services — we create an elevated environment for pets through innovative systems, education, and premium experiences.

Our website is a key part of this mission — and we're looking for a developer who can help us turn it into a high-performing, conversion-driven platform.



The Role



We're looking for a WordPress Web Developer who can go beyond execution.

Your first responsibility is to analyze our current website — identify gaps, friction points, and missed opportunities — then help us improve performance, user experience, and conversions.

This is not a "just follow instructions" role. We want someone who can think, suggest, and build.



What You'll Do



Audit our current website and provide actionable recommendations

Improve site structure, speed, and performance

Optimize for conversions (bookings, inquiries, sign-ups)

Implement design and UX improvements aligned with our brand

Build or refine landing pages, funnels, and service pages

Ensure mobile responsiveness and clean user journeys

Integrate tools (forms, CRM,
, analytics, etc.)

Maintain and troubleshoot the website as needed



What We're Looking For



3+ years of strong experience with WordPress and proficient with Elementor

Solid understanding of UX/UI and conversion optimization

Ability to analyze a website and identify improvement areas

Experience with page speed optimization

Familiarity with SEO best practices

Detail-oriented and proactive communicator

Someone who can align with a wellness-focused, premium brand



Bonus If You Have



Experience with funnels and landing page strategy

Background in branding or design thinking

Experience working with service-based businesses

Understanding of storytelling in web structure



How to Apply



Please follow instructions carefully.

Use the subject line: HOLISTIC – WordPress Developer

Send the following:

Resume





Portfolio (live links only)

Links to your completed WordPress projects

Availability

Rates

Review our website (link provided upon application)

Share at least 3 improvements you would make





Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.



Why Join Us

You'll be working closely with a brand that is building something bigger than a typical business — we're creating a new category in pet care.

If you're someone who enjoys thinking, improving, and building with purpose, this is for you.

title: Meta Ads Operator / Media Buyer
description:
We are hiring someone to run and grow our Meta ads.



This is not a basic VA role. You will be making decisions that directly affect revenue. If you do well, you will grow with the company.



About Us

XMODE is a U.S.-based company selling high-performance energy shots online (Amazon, Shopify, eBay). We manufacture our own product and have a strong repeat customer base.



We’ve built a real team in the Philippines:

4 full-time tea
mbers

1 part-time developer

Thousands of hours of paid training invested



We take our team seriously. If you perform, this is a long-term role.



JOB FUNCTION 

You will manage and improve our Meta 
/Instagram) ad account.

Build and manage campaigns in Meta Ads Manager

Monitor performance (CPA, ROAS, MER, CTR, CVR)

D
 when to scale, cut, or adjust budgets

Analyze performance and report weekly

Maintain a clear weekly testing plan (creatives, audiences, offers)

Identify winning and losing creatives (especially video)

Research competitors and new ad angles

Make sure tracking is working (Pixel / basic events)



You are not here to “boost posts.”



HOURS 

Starting: 10–15 hours per week 

Phase 2: 15–25 hours per week

Phase 3:  25-40 hours per week (can expand to full-time with broader responsibilities)

Hours grow as performance and spend grow.



REQUIRED: 

Real experience running Meta Ads (even small accounts is fine if you actually managed them)

Strong analytical thinking

Comfortable working with performance data

Organized and reliable

Good English communication



PREFERRED: 

E-commerce experience

Understanding of funnels (landing pages, conversion rates)

Experience testing creatives

Familiarity with Shopify 



COMPENSATION 

Based on experience and demonstrated ability

Starts lean and increases with performance and account growth

Long-term opportunity for the right person



HOW TO APPLY - Include the following:

A short summary of your Meta Ads experience

One example of a campaign you worked on (what you did + results)

What you would do with the first $5,000 in budget 



Applications without these will not be reviewed.



HIRING PROCESS 

Shortlisted candidates will interview with me (owner)

Final interview with our Philippines team



If you’re serious about getting very good at performance marketing and want a real opportunity, this is a strong place to do it.

title: DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist
description:
DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist



(High Salary Growth · with Huge Performance Bonuses · Long-Term Role)



No Beginners — Only Serious, Skilled Editors Apply



We are hiring a full-time, highly skilled premier pro video editor & marketing-focused creative who understands viral video creation at a deep level and can produce multiple high-quality, high-retention videos every single day.



This role is for someone who wants to grow with a team, build a long-term career, and be rewarded heavily for performance. The better your videos perform, the more you earn.



This is a highly rewarded role with massive long-term income potential for the right individual. Including huge extra benefits for top loyal perfomers





What We’re Looking For



We want a serious, dedicated editor who:

• Understands how viral videos work — especially on TikTok, Reels, and modern short-form platforms



• Can produce multiple 4-8 high-quality videos daily using Adobe Premiere Pro



• Has strong marketing instincts and understands how to create “watchable,” high-retention content



• Is motivated to grow their career, earn more, and become a key part of our long-term team

• Is committed, reliable, and consistent with daily output



• Wants a full-time role with massive salary growth opportunities



This position is for professionals only — no beginners, no part-timers, no hobby editors.







Salary & Growth



Starting Range: $400–$500 - can lead up to $1,500/month

(Depending on skills, experience, creativity, and daily output)



• Salary increases are based on your permanent

• Bonuses rewarded for high-performing viral videos

• The more the content grows, the more your salary grows

• Long-term potential for very high monthly pay for top performers

• Travel opportunities and niche-specific projects available as you grow within the company



- To be part of a multinational team that cares about you, and be part of a team not just staff



We only hire people who want a full-time, long-term home — not freelancers jumping from project to project.







Your Responsibilities:



4-8 videos Daily Video Editing & Production (duration anwher from 10secs to 2 mins+ )



• Produce multiple short-form videos per day for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts



• Edit in Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable)



• Add creative transitions, pacing, captions, sound design, and storytelling



• Create viral-style videos without relying on generic templates



• Improve based on performance data & feedback



Marketing & Creative Strategy

• Work with the team to develop ideas, concepts, and hooks



• Help craft videos that sell, entertain, educate, or retain attention



• Understand how to market a physical product through content



• Be resourceful and solution-oriented with limited footage



• Create scenes using alternative footage, B-roll, and creative storytelling if clips are missing



Collaboration

• Work daily with our team (creators, assistants, strategists)

• Help turn raw ideas into powerful, viral-ready videos

• Bring your own suggestions, creativity, and marketing mind to every project







 What Makes This Role Unique:

• You will help grow a fast-scaling brand with huge global potential

• Long-term, stable, career-building opportunity

• You will have the freedom to grow, lead, and experiment creatively

• Exposure to different niches, products, and video styles

• Uploads of product footage will be provided, but creativity is required — when footage is missing, we adapt and find solutions

• Massive future salary growth for the right editor

• Opportunities to travel with the team as operations expand in couple of months from now



This is a job for someone who wants to build a real career, not just “edit videos.”







Ideal Candidate Profile

• Strong Adobe Premiere Pro skills

• Deep understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts virality

• Fast, efficient, and consistent daily editor

• Creative thinker with marketing instincts

• Problem solver who can work with limited footage

• Team player with great communication

• Long-term mindset with the ambition to grow inside the company

• Able to take feedback and improve quickly

• Full-time availability (no other jobs on the side)



 To Apply



Please send:

1. Your best short-form video examples (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

2. A short message explaining your experience with viral content

3. Your expected salary range

4. Confirmation you can work full-time, long-term

5. Your availability and commitment level



?

 Final Note



This is an exciting, high-growth opportunity for a dedicated editor who wants to rise, earn more, and build a powerful career inside a fast-growing company.

If you’re ready to work full-time, produce high-performing videos daily, and grow with a long-term team — we want to hear from you.



Only committed, professional video editors should apply.

title: GOOGLE PPC EXPERT full time expert ($1000-$2000 BIG SALARY GROWTH TO PROS)
description:
NO AI RESPONSES PLEASE - LOOKING FOR GENUINE CONNECTIONS ( honesty goes a long way!)



High-Reward Role · Performance-Based Salary · Long-Term Position · Serious Applicants Only



We are seeking a highly experienced, full-time PPC & SEO expert to manage and scale our Google Ads and other major advertising platforms on a monthly basis.



This is a results-driven role.

The more revenue you bring in, the higher your salary will be.



There is no waiting months for raises. Your compensation is directly tied to the value you bring and the performance you deliver. If you produce results fast, you get rewarded fast.



This is a lucrative, long-term opportunity for a skilled PPC & SEO professional who understands performance marketing, scaling profitable campaigns, and optimising for ROI — and who wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand.



?



???? If your plan is to “set and forget” campaigns, rely on guesswork, or use AI blindly without strategy — this is NOT the role for you.



We want a real performance marketer who understands data, intent, optimisation, and revenue.



?



???? Compensation & Growth



Base Salary: $350–$600/month (depending on experience and skill level)

Performance-Based Growth: $1,000–$2,000+/month based on results

• Salary increases are tied solely to performance and revenue impact

• No probation delays, no waiting periods

• High performers are rewarded immediately

• No earning ceiling — your results define your income



???? If you bring results in Month 1, you get rewarded in Month 1.



?



???? What You Will Be Responsible For

• Managing, optimising, and scaling Google Ads campaigns

• Managing paid campaigns across other major platforms if applicable

• Monitoring daily performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, conversions, revenue)

• Cutting wasted spend and scaling profitable campaigns

• Implementing advanced strategies to improve ROI

• Conducting in-depth keyword research and competitor analysis

• Supporting SEO strategy to improve organic performance

• Improving landing page alignment with ads and intent

• Collaborating on ad copy, creatives, and funnel strategy

• Continuously testing, optimising, and refining campaign structure

• Reporting clearly on performance, insights, and next actions



?



???? Ideal Candidate

• Proven experience running profitable Google Ads campaigns

• Strong understanding of PPC scaling and optimisation

• Solid SEO knowledge (keyword research, on-page, technical basics)

• Data-driven, analytical, and performance-obsessed

• Comfortable working toward clear revenue targets

• Proactive, solution-oriented, and detail-focused

• Treats this role as a full-time career, not a side project

• Hungry to earn more by delivering real, measurable results



?



???? What Makes This Opportunity Unique

• Work with a fast-scaling international brand

• Direct impact on revenue and growth

• Performance-based pay with immediate upside

• Long-term stability with strong infrastructure already in place

• Freedom to implement what works — no micromanagement

• Opportunity to become our go-to paid media & growth expert

• A team that values results, ownership, and accountability



We already have strong foundations — now we want someone who can push performance to the next level.



?



? Deliverables

• Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns

• Monitor, analyse, and report PPC performance

• Improve ROI and conversion efficiency

• Conduct keyword research and analysis

• Collaborate on ad copy, creatives, and landing page strategy



?



???? Final Note



This is not a maintenance role.

This is a growth role for someone who wants to scale revenue, be rewarded fairly, and build a long-term position inside a serious company.



NDA WILL NEED TO BE SIGNED BEFORE HIRE



If you’re a true PPC & SEO expert who wants to be paid based on results — not promises — we want to hear from you.



Only experienced, performance-driven applicants should apply.

title: Full-Time PPC & SEO Expert (Google Ads + Revenue Growth Specialist)
description:
NO AI RESPONSES PLEASE - LOOKING FOR GENUINE CONNECTIONS ( honesty goes a long way!)



High-Reward Role · Performance-Based Salary · Long-Term Position · Serious Applicants Only



We are seeking a highly experienced, full-time PPC & SEO expert to manage and scale our Google Ads and other major advertising platforms on a monthly basis.



This is a results-driven role.

The more revenue you bring in, the higher your salary will be.



There is no waiting months for raises. Your compensation is directly tied to the value you bring and the performance you deliver. If you produce results fast, you get rewarded fast.



This is a lucrative, long-term opportunity for a skilled PPC & SEO professional who understands performance marketing, scaling profitable campaigns, and optimising for ROI — and who wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand.



?



???? If your plan is to “set and forget” campaigns, rely on guesswork, or use AI blindly without strategy — this is NOT the role for you.



We want a real performance marketer who understands data, intent, optimisation, and revenue.



?



???? Compensation & Growth



Base Salary: $350–$600/month (depending on experience and skill level)

Performance-Based Growth: $1,000–$2,000+/month based on results

 • Salary increases are tied solely to performance and revenue impact

 • No probation delays, no waiting periods

 • High performers are rewarded immediately

 • No earning ceiling — your results define your income



???? If you bring results in Month 1, you get rewarded in Month 1.



?



???? What You Will Be Responsible For

 • Managing, optimising, and scaling Google Ads campaigns

 • Managing paid campaigns across other major platforms if applicable

 • Monitoring daily performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, conversions, revenue)

 • Cutting wasted spend and scaling profitable campaigns

 • Implementing advanced strategies to improve ROI

 • Conducting in-depth keyword research and competitor analysis

 • Supporting SEO strategy to improve organic performance

 • Improving landing page alignment with ads and intent

 • Collaborating on ad copy, creatives, and funnel strategy

 • Continuously testing, optimising, and refining campaign structure

 • Reporting clearly on performance, insights, and next actions



?



???? Ideal Candidate

 • Proven experience running profitable Google Ads campaigns

 • Strong understanding of PPC scaling and optimisation

 • Solid SEO knowledge (keyword research, on-page, technical basics)

 • Data-driven, analytical, and performance-obsessed

 • Comfortable working toward clear revenue targets

 • Proactive, solution-oriented, and detail-focused

 • Treats this role as a full-time career, not a side project

 • Hungry to earn more by delivering real, measurable results



?



???? What Makes This Opportunity Unique

 • Work with a fast-scaling international brand

 • Direct impact on revenue and growth

 • Performance-based pay with immediate upside

 • Long-term stability with strong infrastructure already in place

 • Freedom to implement what works — no micromanagement

 • Opportunity to become our go-to paid media & growth expert

 • A team that values results, ownership, and accountability



We already have strong foundations — now we want someone who can push performance to the next level.



?



? Deliverables

 • Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns

 • Monitor, analyse, and report PPC performance

 • Improve ROI and conversion efficiency

 • Conduct keyword research and analysis

 • Collaborate on ad copy, creatives, and landing page strategy



?



???? Final Note



This is not a maintenance role.

This is a growth role for someone who wants to scale revenue, be rewarded fairly, and build a long-term position inside a serious company.



NDA WILL NEED TO BE SIGNED BEFORE HIRE



If you’re a true PPC & SEO expert who wants to be paid based on results — not promises — we want to hear from you.



Only experienced, performance-driven applicants should apply.

title: Windows AD, Active Directory Setup
description:
Hello, I’m looking for someone who can help set up a windows Active Directory environment.  That includes setting up the users and computers connecting to the server, dns, objects, Remote Desktop, etc.  It’s partially set up but needs to be finished.  Please let me know if you can help with that.



Next we need to add azure cloud AD with entra connect for a hybred environment. 



Any skills will be helpful with just setting up AD alone or also helping with Azure cloud AD in the hybred environment or also setting up SCCM as well. 



Please let us know where your skills are and how you can help!  Thanks and I look forward to speaking with you!



Thanks 

Next Level Tech Manager

Remote Desktop

DNS

Microsoft 365

TCP/IP

Windows Server administration

configuration

title: Social Media Manager (Instagram + Facebook + LinkedIn) — Education Brand (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
The Aftercare Academy delivers clinically grounded education for qualified therapists, focused on safe, structured Manual Lymphatic Therapy and postoperative care. We help therapists progress from uncertainty to confident, ethical practice through clear teaching, professional standards, and real clinical experience.



The Role



I’m looking for a Social Media Manager to take ownership of our content execution — turning ideas and raw material into consistent, well-presented posts that build trust and drive workshop/masterclass enquiries.



This is not a “trendy” beauty brand. The tone needs to feel professional, calm, educational, and credible.



Key Responsibilities (Core)

Content planning + scheduling for Instagram &
 (weekly/monthly calendar)

Create and publish reels, carousels, and posts from provided topics, voice notes, rough copy, and existing assets

Write strong, clear captions with appropriate CTAs (without hype)

Community management: respond to comments/DMs (within agreed boundaries), flag clinical questions for escalation

Maintain brand consistency (voice, formatting, cleanliness, professionalism)

Track performance and share simple weekly insights: what’s working, what to repeat, what to stop



Nice-to-Haves

Experience repurposing long-form content into short-form posts

Basic video editing (CapCut/Veed) and clean subtitle formatting

Canva confidence (templates, simple on-brand layouts)

Light support with
 content promos (optional)



What I’m Looking For

Excellent written English and judgement (tone matters here)

You can translate complex/clinical topics into clear, digestible content

Highly organised: you plan, schedule, and don’t miss deadlines

Comfortable working with templates and systems

Proactive communicator — suggests improvements, doesn’t wait to be chased



Platforms & Tools

Instagram +

Metricool

Canva

Meta Business Suite (or Later/Buffer)

CapCut/Veed (optional but helpful)

Google Drive/Docs/Sheets



Hours & Pay

Part-time to start: approx. 10–15 hours/week (potential to grow during launches)

Remote and flexible, with agreed response windows for messages



Success Looks Like

Consistent, high-quality posting

Content that builds trust and positions us as the professional standard

Increased enquiries and conversions to masterclasses/workshops

A smooth workflow where content is planned ahead (not last-minute)



How to Apply



Please send:

A short intro and your relevant experience

Links to 2–3 accounts you’ve managed (or portfolio examples)

Your availability + hourly rate

Tools you’re confident in (Canva, CapCut/Veed, scheduling tools)

Answer: How would you handle a DM asking for clinical advice?

Optional: Create a sample caption for a post titled:

“When is it safe to use deeper pressure work after surgery?” (educational, calm, professional tone)

title: Lead Generation
description:
Google Ads Lead Generation Specialist – Home Services (Remote)



World of Floors is a well established flooring company based in the Detroit Metro area, specializing in Shop-At-Home flooring sales.

We are seeking an experienced Google Ads specialist who understands lead generation marketing for local service businesses.

Our goal is simple: generate qualified in-home flooring estimate requests at a profitable cost per lead.

This is NOT a social media role. This position focuses strictly on high-intent search traffic.



Responsibilities

• Build and manage Google Search campaigns for flooring installation

• Keyword research and expansion

• Negative keyword management

• Bid management and budget optimization

• Conversion tracking setup (calls + form submissions)

• Weekly performance reporting

• Landing page optimization recommendations



Performance Targets

• Maintain cost per lead

• Generate 150+ estimate requests per month

• Maintain strong Quality Scores across campaigns



Requirements

• 3+ years Google Ads experience

• Proven lead generation campaign results

• Experience with call tracking and conversion tracking

• Strong English communication



Compensation

$1,200 – $2,000/month depending on experience.

Please include:

Screenshots of campaign performance you have managed

Example cost per lead results

Description of campaign structure used

title: UI Designer – SaaS Products (Remote / Full-Time)
description:
We are looking for a talented UI Designer with hands-on experience designing SaaS applications to join our growing team.



What You'll Do



Design clean, intuitive user interfaces for web-based SaaS products

Create wireframes, mockups, and high-fidelity prototypes

Collaborate closely with product and development teams

Maintain and evolve design systems and component libraries

Translate complex workflows into simple, user-friendly experiences

What We're Looking For



Proven experience designing SaaS or web application interfaces

Strong portfolio — SaaS product work is required (see below)

Proficiency in Figma or similar design tools

Eye for detail, typography, spacing, and visual consistency

Ability to work independently and communicate clearly in English

Bonus: experience with responsive design and developer handoff

Requirements



At least 2 years of UI design experience

Reliable internet connection and own equipment

Available for overlap with European or US time zones

How to Apply
