title: Rockstar Lead Generator/New Business Prospector
description:
Background:

Our new financial services business is looking for a rockstar to lead our new client prospecting and outreach to help us grow our business through prospecting, researching potential clients, and making initial contact and scheduling appointments.



Job Description:

Daily Responsibilities include

1. Finding prospective customers through multiple social media channels - youtube,
, linkedin, instagram, tiktok and contacting them to solicit interest and new business.

2. Researching local businesses and professionals through google and other channels to find potential clients in niche markets and reaching out by
, social media, phone call or text.

3. Use spreadsheet or CRM to track all contacts made and provide daily report.

4. Spark interest while keeping contacts brief and transitioning warm leads to advisor/customer service rep.

5. Schedule appointments for prospects to meet with an advisor or customer service rep.

6. Follow strict rules on information able to provide - financial services are regulated and only certain details/information can be shared or gathered by unlicensed personnel.



What we are looking for:

1. Two years of experience in lead generation, prospecting or appointment setting.

2. Experienced with multiple social media platforms and using to search for contacts - linkedin,
, youtube

3. Highly organized and detail oriented

4. Excellent written English communication skills - most client communications will be made online in written format

5. Ability to contact research and contact high volume of leads



Technical Skills:

1. Written communication

2. Prospecting

3. Appointment Setting

4. Follows instructions and guidelines extremely closely



Basic Skills:

In addition to having excellent English skills, you'll need to use a number of applications.

1. Search engines like Google, IE, Bing, etc.

2. Social Media Sites - Youtube, Linkedin,
, TikTok, Instagram

3. Microsoft Excel

4. Microsoft Word

5. Project Management software (Basecamp/Asana)

6. Microsoft Outlook

7. Gmail, Google Docs, Google Sheets

8. Communication apps like
, WhatsApp, Slack, Teams



Schedule:

This is a full time position, 8 hours a day. Hours are somewhat flexible - day shift, swing shift or overnight can work. Needs to have at least 4 hours a day between 11PM - 10AM Manila time at least 3 week days so you can overlap some with US business hours in Pacific Time Zone. Remaining hours are flexible. We don't like to micromanage or time track, we only care about performance!







To Apply:

Include in the subject line "Rockstar Lead Generator - [Your Name]"



Please answer the following questions

1. Where are you in the Philippines?

2. What is your experience in sales/marketing/lead generation?

3. Why do you want to work for us?

4. What is your preferred schedule?

title: Paid Ads Operator/ Media Buyer — Meta Ads + Google Ads (E-Commerce / DTC)
description:
We run multiple direct-to-consumer e-commerce brands on Shopify, scaling through paid Meta and Google advertising. We need a detail-oriented ads operator who can execute inside ad accounts with speed, accuracy, and an understanding of WHY things are structured the way they are.

This is an execution role, not a strategy role. You'll receive creative direction, campaign structures, and scaling decisions from the founder and creative team. Your job is to execute flawlessly inside Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads, upload creatives correctly, monitor performance daily, and flag issues fast.

What You'll Do:

— Upload static and video ad creatives into Meta Ads Manager following exact naming conventions and campaign structures provided

— Set up Dynamic Creative Tests (DCTs) and CBO campaigns with concept-based ad sets as directed

— Schedule ad launches correctly (midnight in ad account timezone)

— Duplicate winning ads and move them to scaling campaigns (Champions ad set structure)

— Set up and manage Google Ads campaigns (Performance Max, Search, Shopping)

— Monitor daily performance: ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, hook rate, hold rate, frequency, spend velocity

— Flag creative fatigue early (rising frequency, declining CTR, dropping ROAS)

— Provide concise daily or weekly performance summaries with clear call-outs on winners, losers, and what needs attention

— Track learning phase status and flag when too many ads are stuck in learning

— Maintain strict naming conventions and keep the ad account clean and organized

— Ensure creative diversity across the account (different formats, angles, avatars — not 15 variations of the same image)

Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

— 1–2+ years hands-on experience running Meta Ads for e-commerce or DTC brands (not lead gen, not local business, not boosted posts)

— Working experience with Google Ads (Performance Max and Shopping at minimum)

— Understands CBO vs ABO and when each is used

— Knows how to set up and read DCT breakdown data to identify winning creative variables

— Understands creative diversity and why similar-looking ads get penalized by Meta's algorithm

— Comfortable reading ad metrics: ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, hook rate, hold rate, frequency

— Familiar with broad targeting as a primary prospecting approach (no interest stacking)

— Fluent English (written communication must be clear)

— Reliable internet and available during some overlap with US Eastern timezone

— Works independently once given clear direction

Nice to Have:

— Experience with 
 or bulk ad upload tools

— Familiarity with Foreplay.co

— Understanding of ad-to-landing-page message match

— Experience managing multiple brands simultaneously

Compensation:

— $
/month base depending on experience and hours

— Performance bonuses tied to account KPIs

— Clear path to increased comp as brands scale

To Apply — You Must Include All of the Following:



A 2–3 sentence intro about your e-commerce ad experience

A screenshot or Loom video walkthrough of an ad account you've managed (blur sensitive data — we want to see structure, naming conventions, and organization)

Your timezone and daily availability

Your expected monthly rate

Answer this question: "An ad set in your testing campaign has been live for 3 days. One ad has taken 85% of the spend but ROAS is below target. The other two ads have barely spent. What do you do and why?"

title: Account Manager
description:
Job Title: Utilities Setup and Accounts Clean-Up Coordinator

Job Type: Fixed-term contract

Contract Length: 4 weeks

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, aligned to UK business hours



Contract Fee: ?40,000 fixed for the 4-week contract

Bonus: ?10,000 completion bonus based on successful delivery of agreed milestones, weekly handovers, and final project completion

Start Date: Immediate





Job Description

We are a UK property business managing a shared housing portfolio across multiple houses. We are looking for one highly organised and reliable coordinator based in the Philippines to take ownership of a short-term but important utilities and account clean-up project.



The purpose of this role is to review, organise, set up, and clean up utility-related accounts across up to 20 houses. This includes electricity, gas, water, internet, and council tax-related coordination where required.



This is not a long-term admin role. This is a focused 4-week contract for someone who can come in, sort out the utility structure properly, clean up old issues, contact suppliers, help put payment systems in place, research better rates, and leave behind a clean and usable operating system for the business.

You will be expected to work through active and old account issues, chase suppliers properly, set up direct debits, help organise payment plans for debts where needed, and create clear trackers and SOPs for future management.

By the end of the contract, the utility infrastructure should be properly organised, documented, and ready for ongoing use.





What You Will Be Responsible For

You will be responsible for:

Setting up new utility accounts for up to 20 houses, including electricity, gas, water, internet, and council tax-related coordination where required

Reviewing and cleaning up old utility accounts to make sure records are accurate and issues are identified properly

Contacting suppliers directly to resolve account issues, confirm balances, update details, and move accounts into the correct structure

Helping arrange payment plans for debts or arrears where needed and ensuring these are recorded clearly

Setting up direct debits and payment arrangements correctly for active accounts

Researching better rates, tariffs, and suppliers where relevant

Negotiating workable arrangements or improved deals with suppliers where possible

Building a clean utility account structure that is organised, trackable, and usable going forward

Preparing clear trackers, notes, and records so the business has full visibility across all utility accounts

Creating a simple SOP and final handover so the utility setup can be maintained properly after the contract ends



Project Deliverables

By the end of the 4-week contract, we expect:

A full list of all houses and their utility account status

New accounts opened where required

Old accounts reviewed and cleaned up where possible

Debt positions identified and payment plans arranged where needed

Direct debits set up and recorded

Supplier contact notes and account updates maintained clearly

Better tariff or supplier opportunities flagged where relevant

A clean master utility tracker for future use

A simple SOP showing how utility accounts should be managed going forward

A final handover showing what has been completed, what is pending, and what future management should look like





How the Project Will Be Managed:

This contract will be managed in weekly phases with clear handovers.

Each week, you will be expected to provide:

A summary of what has been completed

A list of what remains open

Any blockers or supplier delays

Notes on what action has been taken

Priorities for the following week

The project is expected to be completed properly within the 4-week contract period.





Who This Role Is For:

This role is for someone who is highly organised, good at follow-up, comfortable dealing with suppliers, and able to bring structure to messy account situations.

You should be confident handling multiple houses, multiple accounts, and multiple supplier conversations at the same time.

You should be able to work independently, keep records properly, and push issues forward without constant supervision.

This role suits someone who is practical, detail-focused, calm under pressure, and good at getting admin and supplier issues resolved properly.





Essential Requirements:

You must:

Have experience in account setup, supplier coordination, admin clean-up, utilities handling, or similar operational support work

Be comfortable managing multiple properties, accounts, or suppliers at the same time

Have strong written and spoken English

Be highly organised and detail-focused

Be confident following up with suppliers and pushing issues toward resolution

Be comfortable using spreadsheets, trackers, and written process notes

Be available for a fixed 4-week project aligned to UK business hours

Have a stable remote setup with reliable internet and laptop





Preferred Experience:



It is preferred if you have experience in one or more of the following:

UK property or portfolio administration

Utility account coordination

Council tax or supplier handling

Debt follow-up or payment plan setup

Process building or SOP creation

Property operations, facilities admin, or infrastructure coordination



Compensation Structure:

This role is offered on a 4-week fixed contract fee of ?40,000.

In addition, there is ?10,000 completion bonus available based on successful delivery of agreed milestones, weekly handovers, and final project completion.

The completion bonus is not automatic and will only be paid if the work is completed properly, handed over clearly, and the agreed project scope is delivered to a satisfactory standard.



How to Apply

 your CV to 
 with the subject line:

Utilities Setup and Accounts

Along with your CV, send a short audio / video introduction, answer the following:



Have you handled multiple properties, suppliers, or account issues at the same time

Give one real example of a messy account, supplier, or admin issue you helped resolve

Why do you believe you are suitable for a 4-week project-based role with clear delivery targets

title: WEEKEND YOUTUBE REAL ESTATE VIDEO EDITOR [ONE SPOT LEFT]
description:
PLEASE READ THIS SEGMENT BEFORE YOU APPLY



**WE'RE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE TO WORK WEDNESDAY - SUNDAY [US TIME]**



**WE ARE NOT WORKING WITH AGENCIES**



**PLEASE SEND PROOF OF VIDEOS MADE (Preferably your top 3 videos edited). ANY APPLICATION WITHOUT PROOF WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY THROWN OUT**

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We are two Filipino Entrepreneurs looking for additional creative video editors for our YouTube Media Marketing Company (Real Estate Niche). We work with over 10 Real Estate clients and manage over a dozen channels all over the United States. The culture that we've built within our team is like a family. We are all Filipino and can understand Tagalog and Bisaya but prefer English. 



Currently, we have an expert media department that has been with us long term. We're starting to gain 
ntum as a company and get new clients at a fast rate, so right now, we're hiring both contractors (Per Job Basis) and Potential full-time editors to add to our amazing media team.



The salary stated in the application is only STARTING SALARY. You have the potential to make as much as you want if you can provide great value.



Our company's name is WG Media, and our website is 
dia



In one year's time, we managed to get 600k+ Video views, and 4,000 subscribers with hundreds of videos on our personal channel and now we are producing results for our other real estate clients.



On your application, please state what makes you stand out from everybody else. We've scanned through hundreds of applicants and those that we've hired so far didn't just copy and paste their applications. Stand out from the crowd by providing something unique about yourself :)



You will be required to edit anywhere from 2 - 4 videos every week, including thumbnails (Potentially more if you can handle it). Our Head of media will provide you with video templates to make things easier. You will need to cut both audio and video while adding b-roll content.



You must be proficient in Video Editing & Photoshop.



WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE LONG TERM (AT LEAST 1-5 YEARS ), So if you are looking for stability and a place where you can work and truly build a career, then this is the place for you. On top of editing videos/photos, we are very into self-development, so you will be required to read one book a month. We give a PDF of this book so you can read it along with the rest of the team.



Also, you will be required to attend 1-2 meetings a week via
 where you will also meet the rest of the team (who are also located in the Philippines)



We need you to have experience editing videos for this position and WOULD LIKE TO SEE PROOF OF VIDEOS THAT YOU'VE ALREADY MADE. We have MASSIVE goals for our company and have been doing YouTube for many years, so if you have YouTube experience then please state that in the description. If you have experience doing YOUTUBE VIDEO EDITING, we will prioritize your application over every else's.



We're looking for somebody who is teachable and can work very fast, so if you are a quick learner and can perform the tasks that we ask, you will be compensated very well. What are you waiting for? APPLY NOW because interviews get booked and we hire FAST (Usually within 2-4 days) There is HUGE upside potential. Again,The salary stated in the application is only STARTING SALARY. You have the potential to make as much as you want if you can provide great value.



IF YOU CAN'T DO A
 VIDEO INTERVIEW THEN DO NOT APPLY, WE HAVE GOTTEN MANY APPLICANTS AND ARE VERY PICKY WITH WHO WE WILL HIRE SO PLEASE BE READY.

title: Integrator / Head of Operations & Execution — DTC Supplement Brand (7-Figure)
description:
Job Title: Integrator / Head of Operations & Execution — DTC Supplement Brand (7-Figure)

Salary: $2,000–$3,000/month + Profit Share Bonus

Hours: Part-Time (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time after 3 months

Timezone: GMT+1 to GMT+4 (European / Middle Eastern business hours)



About Us

Parmint is a 7-figure DTC supplement brand specializing in internal body freshness. We sell directly to consumers through high-converting funnels,
/Meta ads, and
 marketing. Our core product helps people feel confident from the inside out — and we're growing fast.

We're looking for an Integrator — someone who can take the founder's vision and turn it into reality. You'll be the operational backbone of the company: building systems, managing people, executing strategies, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

This is NOT a virtual assistant role. This is a leadership position for someone who wants to help build and run a real company — with skin in the game through profit sharing.



What You'll Do



Operations & Systems: Create SOPs, workflows, and processes from scratch. Build the operational infrastructure that allows the company to scale without the founder being involved in every decision.

Team Management: Help identify, hire, and manage tea
mbers (video editors, customer service, copywriters, media buyers). You'll be their point of contact and make sure everyone delivers on time and on quality.

Marketing Execution: Oversee the execution of
/Meta ad campaigns,
 sequences (Klaviyo), quiz funnels, landing pages, and creative production. You don't need to be the one running ads — but you need to deeply understand how DTC marketing works so you can manage people who do.

Project Management: Keep all moving parts organized. From ad creative production to product launches to customer service escalations — you make sure things get done.

Financial Oversight: Help track budgets, manage invoices, reconcile expenses, and keep the founder informed on financial health.

Strategic Support: Provide input on decisions, flag problems before they become crises, and bring structure to the founder's ideas.





Required



You've worked inside a DTC brand or agency (ideally $1M–$10M range). You know what a funnel is, how
 ads work, what Klaviyo does, and why AOV, LTV, and ROAS matter.

You've built or managed systems, processes, or teams in a previous role.

English fluency (written and spoken) — non-negotiable.

Available during GMT+1 to GMT+4 business hours.

Self-starter: you see a problem, you flag it, you propose a solution, you execute.

Detail-oriented and patient. You double-check everything and care about doing things right.



Nice to Have



Experience in a supplement or health brand, especially marketing health products on Meta.

Hands-on experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, ClickFunnels, or similar tools.

Spanish or Italian language skills.





Compensation



Base: $2,000–$3,000/month (based on experience and location)

Bonus: 5–10% of net profits after 3-month trial period

Growth: This role grows into a full COO position as the company scales





How It Works

Month 1–2 (Part-Time, ~20 hrs/week): You'll audit Parmint's operations — ads, funnels,
, team, customer journey — and present an action plan with prioritized SOPs. This is our mutual test.

Month 3 (Decision Point): If the plan is solid and execution is strong, we move to full-time and profit sharing kicks in.

Month 4+ (Full-Time): You build systems, hire and manage the team, and run day-to-day operations. The founder focuses exclusively on growth strategy.



How to Apply

Send an
 to [YOUR
] with the subject: "Integrator — [Your Name]"

Include:



A short intro about yourself (2–3 paragraphs max). Who are you, what have you done, why does this role interest you?

Your experience with DTC/e-commerce brands. What brands did you work with? What was your role? What results did you achieve?

A 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining why you'd be a great fit. (Mandatory — applications without a video will not be reviewed.)

Your salary expectation (monthly, USD).



No generic cover letters. No AI-generated copy-paste applications. We read every application personally.

title: Video Editor who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Video Editor!’ in the subject line. Please apply through OnlineJobsPh and not via
. The job responsibilities include editing the first minute of videos to grab and keep the audience's attention, selecting the most engaging clips, adding eye-catching transitions and effects, ensuring the sound and visuals are top-notch, and staying on top of the latest trends to keep things fresh. Our goal is to get to 70% audience retention in the first minute. Additionally, strong creativity, attention to detail, and effective communication skills are essential to produce high-quality videos that engage viewers and meet retention goals. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! -Irish #Believe

title: Short-Form Video Editor [Adobe Premiere]
description:
DO NOT SEND YOUR PORTFOLIO LINK.

DO NOT APPLY WITHOUT READING THE INSTRUCTIONS BELOW.



***************INSTRUCTIONS TO APPLY:*****************



REPLY WITH ANSWERS TO THESE 6 QUESTIONS:



1. What video editing software are you most proficient in (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve)? Can you briefly explain your experience level with each?

2. What do you look for when identifying hooks, value adds and call to actions?

3. Describe your process for understanding a brand's specific style guidelines and incorporating them into your edits.

4. Have you ever edited interview footage into multiple, engaging short-form content pieces? If so, can you walk me through your approach?

5. What is your turnaround time for revisions? Can you describe your workflow for meeting tight deadlines while maintaining video quality?

6. What intrigues you about this role as its been outlined above?



SEND 3 (ONLY 3) SAMPLE VIDEOS OF YOURS that best match this style: 
/reel/C8-oj1bvOGu/?igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==



LOOKING TO MIMIC THIS CAPTION STYLE SPECIFICALLY.

NOT INTERESTED IN A LOT OF OVERLAYS OR GRAPHICS THAT ARE DISTRACTING, WANT TO FOCUS ON THE CLIENT AND THEIR VALUE THROUGH THEIR WORDS.



Interviews will be scheduled based on those that follow directions best. Read description and make sure you fit the qualifications before applying. Simple TEST EDIT for 30 second reel will be required.



The Video Editor is responsible for editing short videos tailored for various social media platforms, keeping project management tools up-to-date, and staying on top of social media trends. The Video Editor will be a critical part of the creative team, ensuring high-quality, engaging, and timely video content.



Reports directly to: CEO



**ROLES, RESPONSIBILITIES, EXPECTATIONS**

1. Editing Short-Form Videos for Social Media



Responsibilities:

- Edit and finalize short-form video content for social media channels such as Instagram Reels, TikTok, and
 suited to each brand style, color, etc.

- Work closely with the CEO/Creative Director and Content Team to ensure the videos align with the brand voice and style.



SMART Expectations:

- Specific: Edit videos in line with topic and brand, creative direction, incorporating feedback efficiently.

- Measurable: Complete each edit within a 2-3 hour timeframe start, looking to 4-6 edits /daily after month 1.

- Attainable: Have access to the necessary software and tools for video editing.

- Realistic: Be capable of handling multiple edits per week based on workflow. 10+ videos to start, 20+videos by month 2.

- Timely: Deliver each edit on or before the agreed-upon deadline.



2. Keeping Project Management Up-to-date



Responsibilities:

- Regularly update project management tools with the status of ongoing projects.

- Communicate effectively with the Creative Director and team regarding project timelines and deliverables.



SMART Expectations:

- Specific: Use project management software to track and update the status of each assignment.

- Measurable: Update the project status immediately upon completion of milestones or any changes.

- Attainable: Coordinate with tea
mbers to ensure everyone is aligned.

- Realistic: Make real-time updates achievable within the current workflow.

- Timely: Project statuses should be updated at least once a day.



3. Keeping Up with Social Media Trends



Responsibilities:

- Continuously research and keep up-to-date on the latest social media video trends.

- Implement trend insights into video edits to increase engagement and reach.



SMART Expectations:

- Specific: Identify new trends relevant to our industry and target audience.

- Measurable: Monitor performance metrics to see the impact of implemented trends.

- Attainable: Allocate time each week for trend research.

- Realistic: Actively seek out trends but balance it with existing project responsibilities.

- Timely: Report trends to the Creative Director and team on a weekly basis.



INTERNAL MEETING CADENCE



- 1x week editor training

- Monthly tea
etings



By adhering to these responsibilities and expectations, the Video Editor will significantly contribute to the effectiveness and quality of our content, thus serving our brand's mission and goals effectively.



I look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Accessories Product Developer (Soft Goods)
description:
Overview

We are seeking an experienced Accessories Product Developer to manage the end-to-end development of branded soft goods accessories for a licensed fashion project. This role combines technical design, product development, and production project management and will work directly with factories, licensors, and internal stakeholders.



This is a remote, contract-based role with fast turnaround timelines and high attention to detail required.



Key Responsibilities



Product Development & Technical Design



Create complete factory-ready tech packs for soft goods accessories, including:



Terry cloth pouches



Satin eye masks



Satin scrunchies



Microfiber or terry towel scrunchies



Define and confirm:



Dimensions and tolerances



Materials and fabric specs



Stitching, construction, and finishes



Trim details (zippers, elastic, labels)



Ensure all products are designed for durability, quality, and manufacturability



Artwork & Branding Coordination



Brief and manage all logo and artwork applications



Ensure artwork sizing, placement, and application methods are correct per product



Coordinate strike-offs, lab dips, and logo samples



Review and approve samples prior to submission to licensors



Production & Project Management



Oversee production timelines and key milestones



Coordinate with factories and agents to:



Track sample development



Manage revisions efficiently



Flag risks or delays early



Maintain clear documentation and trackers throughout development



Compliance & Packaging



Ensure all products include required:



Material content labels



Care instructions



Country of origin labeling



Advise on compliant packaging solutions (polybags, warnings, etc.)



Quality Control Support



Support QC planning and execution



Review factory QC reports or third-party inspection results



Ensure corrections are addressed prior to shipment



Required Experience & Skills



3–7 years experience in accessories product development or technical design



Strong experience with soft goods / women’s accessories



Proven ability to create detailed tech packs for factories



Experience working directly with overseas manufacturers



Knowledge of:



Fabrics (terry, microfiber, satin, polyester)



Zippers, elastics, trims, and labeling



Logo application techniques



Excellent project management and communication skills



Comfortable working under tight deadlines



Nice to Have



Experience working with licensed brands



Familiarity with US compliance requirements



Prior experience managing multiple SKUs simultaneously



Deliverables



Factory-ready tech packs



Sample review feedback and approvals



Updated production trackers



Clear communication with all stakeholders Please submit Please answer the following questions when applying. Applications without responses may not be considered.



Can you share examples of tech packs you have created for accessories or soft goods?

(Please describe the products and your role in creating the tech packs.)



Have you worked directly with factories on sample development and strike-offs?

If yes, please explain your experience managing revisions, approvals, and communication with manufacturers.



Which accessory categories have you developed previously?

(For example: pouches, bags, scrunchies, hair accessories, sleep accessories, towels, etc.)



Are you comfortable managing production timelines and following up on deliverables with factories and stakeholders?

Please briefly describe how you track progress and handle tight deadlines.

title: Assistant Property Manager / Operations - Buildium
description:
Assistant Property Manager (Buildium) – Full Time



Portfolio: ~200 Residential Units

Position Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)



Overview



We are seeking a highly organized Remote Assistant Property Manager with experience using Buildium to support the day-to-day operations of our growing portfolio of approximately 200 residential units.



This role will work closely with the CEO and our physical property manager to ensure operations run smoothly across all properties.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, organized, proactive, and comfortable managing systems across a large portfolio.



Key Responsibilities

Assistant to the Property Manager and Operatuions support 



• Maintain accurate property and tenant records in Buildium

• Assist the CEO and physical property manager with operational tasks

• Maintain organized digital property files and documentation

• Monitor internal workflows to ensure tasks are completed on time



Vacancy & Marketing Oversight



Ensure vacant units are properly marketed and competitive in the market.



Responsibilities include:



• Confirm listings are posted on major rental platforms (Zillow, 
, etc.)

• Review listings for photo quality, pricing accuracy, and strong descriptions

• Monitor listing performance and flag units that may need improvements

• Ensure units remain visible and competitive online



Vacancy Tracking & Leasing Pipeline



Maintain a vacancy tracker and leasing pipeline including:



• vacant units

• days on market

• showings scheduled

• applications received

• approved applicants

• units pending lease signing



This allows leadership to quickly identify problem units or slow-moving listings.



Lease Expiration Monitoring







Operational Reporting



Provide a weekly operations summary including:



• current vacancies

• applications received

• leases signed

• upcoming lease expirations

• general portfolio activity



Bookkeeping Oversight. Must be proficient in Buildium accounting. 



Requirements



• Experience using Buildium 

• Prior experience working with a property management company

• Strong organizational and operational skills

• Ability to manage tasks across a 200-unit portfolio

• Excellent written communication

• Comfortable working remotely and independently



Preferred Qualifications



• Experience supporting 100+ unit portfolios

• Experience with vacancy marketing and rental listings

• Experience supporting property management operations



Hours



Full-time (50 hours per week)

Remote position supporting a portfolio of ~200 residential units.



Long-term opportunity with a growing property management company.



***IMPORTANT*** This role requires your full focus during scheduled working hours. Working other jobs while on the clock, misrepresenting hours, or attempting to bypass time tracking is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate termination. We utilize Time Doctor to monitor work hours and productivity including screenshots, video recordings and tracking of mouse movements to discourage and prevent theft of time. 



Application Instructions



Please answer the following questions in your application:



1. Are you currently working any other full-time or part-time jobs? If yes, please explain.



2. Can you commit to working exclusively for us during the scheduled hours for this role?



3. Have you ever performed any tasks related to overall operations?



4. What were your primary responsibilities in your previous property management role How many Units under management?



5. Do you understand that working other jobs while on the clock will lead to an immediate termination?



6. Include a video introduction describing your experience and how you would be an asset to our team.



Send your CV and please include the phrase “Rock Star” in the subject line so we know you read the full posting.



Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Motion Graphic Specalist @ vidrush
description:
JOB POSTING

Motion Graphics Template Specification Writer

Template Design & PRD Author  —  Template Team

Department:

Template Team — Motion Graphics System

Reports To:

CEO / Head of Product

Location:

Remote (Global)

Type:

Full-Time Contract

Compensation:

Competitive — Based on Experience







About VidRush

VidRush is an AI-powered video editing platform that generates fully edited, professional-quality YouTube videos from a single text prompt. Our system uses a library of motion graphic templates — lower thirds, title cards, stat overlays, transitions, text animations, list animations, data visualisations, and complex animated sequences — to give every video a polished, custom-edited feel. Our quality benchmark is a $100 Fiverr/Upwork edit: every video we produce should look like it was made by a skilled human editor with taste and editorial judgment.

The template library is the backbone of VidRush’s visual identity system. Templates are pre-built motion graphic compositions that accept configurable inputs (text, colours, images, animation variants) through structured schemas. They are coded by our developer team in Remotion (a React-based video rendering framework) and styled dynamically using each channel’s Brand Config so that no two channels ever look the same. Our target is a library of 1,000+ templates across every common motion graphic category, with multiple visual variations of each, making it virtually impossible for viewers or YouTube’s content reviewers to identify a “template fingerprint” across different VidRush channels.





What This Role Is

This is not a traditional motion graphics job. You are not producing final deliverables for clients or rendering video for social media. Instead, you are the creative architect who designs motion graphics and then translates them into extremely detailed written specifications — what we call Template PRDs (Product Requirement Documents) — that our developer team uses to build the templates in code.

Think of it this way: you design the motion graphic in After Effects (or your tool of choice), and then you write a technical blueprint of that design so detailed that a developer who has never seen the original animation can recreate it perfectly in Remotion. Every layer, every keyframe, every easing curve, every blend mode, every pixel offset, every font weight, every animation phase — all of it documented with precision.

The PRDs you write are essentially motion graphics explained to AI and developers. They are structured Google Docs that break down a motion graphic composition into its atomic components: the layer stack from front to back, the exact animation timeline with frame-accurate phases, keyframe data with cubic-bezier easing strings, typography specifications, shape geometries, visual effects parameters, matte and masking logic, and developer translation notes. These documents are the single source of truth that the template development team works from.

Your Day-to-Day

On a typical day, you will open After Effects (or your preferred motion graphics tool), design a template or variation, and then write the corresponding PRD in a Google Doc following VidRush’s established specification format. You will be working across multiple template categories: title cards, lower thirds, bullet-point overlays, stat counters, comparison layouts, list animations, call-to-action graphics, transitions, text overlays, image annotation overlays, and more. For each template, you will also be responsible for designing visual variations — alternative looks, colour treatments, layout rearrangements, or animation styles that share the same underlying schema but look distinctly different. Once a developer has coded your PRD into a working Remotion template, you will review their output against your original design and provide feedback until the template matches your specification.





What a Template PRD Contains

Each PRD you produce follows a standardised structure. Below is a summary of the sections you will be writing for every single template and variation:

Core Metadata: Template name, category, complexity rating, resolution (1920×1080), frame rate (30fps), total duration in frames and seconds.

Visual Reference: A reference animation file (.mp4) and/or frame screenshots showing the animation progression and final hold state. You create these from your After Effects comp.

Layer Stack (Front to Back): Every layer in the composition listed in exact render order. For each layer: its type (text, shape, solid, footage, adjustment), its parent relationships, blend modes, opacity, matte/mask assignments, and a clear description of its visual purpose.

Animation Phases: The timeline broken into named phases (Entry, Hold, Exit, etc.) with frame-accurate start/end points. A narrative description of what happens visually during each phase.

Timing Breakdown Table: A structured table listing every animated property, its start value, end value, frame range, duration, and easing description.

Keyframe Data: The raw keyframe values for every animated property. Frame number, value (scale, position, opacity, trim path percentage, etc.), and the exact CSS cubic-bezier easing string for each segment.

Shape Specifications: For any vector shapes: geometry type, dimensions, stroke width, stroke colour, fill colour, dash patterns, line cap/join settings, and any path-drawing animations.

Visual Effects Detail: Parameters for every effect applied: Gaussian blur radius, chromatic aberration values, roughen edges settings, drop shadows (colour, opacity, direction, distance, softness), brightness/contrast values — with CSS or filter equivalents where applicable.

Typography Specifications: Font family, weight, size, colour, alignment, leading, and any text animator details (character-by-character reveals, staggered opacity, scale animations). Includes the exact font file mapping.

Matte & Mask Logic: Any track mattes (alpha, alpha inverted, luma) documented with which layer sources the matte and which layer receives it. Includes developer translation notes for how to achieve the effect in CSS/Canvas (e.g., globalCompositeOperation, mask-image).

Developer Notes: Specific guidance for Remotion translation: how to handle nested parenting, which properties must be animated via wrapper elements vs. direct transforms, mathematical centering offsets, and any gotchas.





Output Expectations

This is a high-volume production role. The template library is critical infrastructure for VidRush’s product and its growth, and we are significantly behind on where we need to be. The pace of PRD delivery directly determines how fast our developer team can build and how quickly we can scale toward our 1,000+ template target.

Weekly target: 30–50 completed Template PRDs per week as a baseline. 60+ per week is the preferred pace. This includes both new original templates and visual variations of existing templates.

Variations vs. new templates: A large portion of your output will be variations. Once a base template exists with its full PRD, a variation changes the visual treatment (different colour palette, different layout arrangement, different animation style, different texture/overlay) while reusing the same schema structure. Variations are faster to produce because the underlying animation logic and schema are already defined — you are changing how it looks, not how it works. Variation PRDs should take significantly less time than fully new template PRDs.

Stay ahead of the developers: You must be at least one to two weeks ahead of the development team at all times. The developers should never be waiting on you for work. If they are idle because there are no PRDs to build from, that is a failure state.

Daily posting: You will post completed PRDs daily in the team’s Slack channel along with the reference animation files. This is how the team tracks velocity and ensures continuous throughput.





Template Review Responsibility

Your job does not end when you hand off the PRD. Once a developer codes a template based on your specification, you are responsible for reviewing their output. This means comparing the rendered Remotion template against your original After Effects design and the PRD document, and providing clear, specific feedback on any discrepancies. This covers animation timing, easing accuracy, colour fidelity, typography rendering, layer ordering, effect accuracy, and overall visual match.

You are the quality gate between the PRD and the final shipped template. If a template does not match the specification, you flag it, describe what is wrong, and work with the developer until it does. This review loop is essential because the developers are building from your written description, not from the After Effects file directly — so the accuracy of your PRD and the thoroughness of your review are what determine the final quality.





Required Skills & Experience

Motion Graphics Design

Strong proficiency in Adobe After Effects. You must be able to design professional-quality motion graphics from scratch: title cards, lower thirds, text animations, transitions, stat overlays, list reveals, and other common video production elements.

A confident creative eye for layout, typography, colour, and animation timing. Your designs set the visual standard for VidRush’s entire template library.

Experience with common After Effects techniques: shape layers, trim paths, track mattes (alpha, alpha inverted, luma), parenting/null objects, text animators, adjustment layers, blend modes, and effects like Roughen Edges, Gaussian Blur, and Chromatic Aberration.

Ability to work quickly. You are not spending hours polishing a single hero animation. You are producing high volumes of clean, well-structured compositions at production pace.

Technical Specification Writing

The ability to look at a motion graphic you have designed and decompose it into a written specification with frame-level accuracy. This is the core skill of the role.

Comfort with precise technical language: keyframe values, cubic-bezier easing curves, pixel dimensions, hex colour codes, font metrics, trim path percentages, blend mode names, and effect parameters.

Methodical attention to detail. Missing a single layer, forgetting a blend mode, or misreporting a keyframe value means the developer builds the wrong thing. Your PRDs must be airtight.

Clear, structured writing. The PRDs follow a specific format with tables, layer stacks, timing breakdowns, and keyframe data blocks. You must be comfortable producing structured technical documentation, not just prose.

Workflow & Communication

Self-directed work ethic. This is a remote, high-output role. You manage your own time and consistently hit volume targets without daily supervision.

Comfort working in Google Docs, Slack, and screen recording tools. You will share your work daily and communicate async with the development team.

Ability to give precise, constructive design feedback when reviewing developer output. Not just “this looks wrong” but “the easing on the scale animation is too linear between frames 16–61; the original uses cubic-bezier(0.9,0,0.1,1) which should produce a fast start with smooth deceleration.”





Nice to Have

Familiarity with Remotion or React-based animation frameworks. Understanding how motion graphics translate to code will make your PRDs more developer-friendly.

Experience with CSS animations, SVG filters, or Canvas compositing. Several PRD sections include CSS/filter equivalents for After Effects techniques.

Background in video editing or YouTube content production. Understanding the end use case (YouTube videos with motion graphics) helps you design templates that work well in real editorial contexts.

Experience using AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, etc.) to accelerate workflows. Our developers use these tools heavily, and understanding their capabilities can help you write PRDs that are more AI-parseable.





What Success Looks Like

In Your First Week:

You have reviewed existing PRDs and the established specification format. You have designed and delivered your first batch of 5–10 template PRDs (a mix of new templates and variations). You are posting daily in Slack. The development team has started building from your documents.

In Your First Month:

You are consistently hitting 30–50 PRDs per week. You are at least one week ahead of the development team. You have completed review cycles on the first batch of developer-built templates and provided clear feedback. The team’s build velocity has noticeably increased because they always have a queue of PRDs to work from.

In Your First Quarter:

You are the creative engine of the template library. The library has expanded by hundreds of templates and variations. Your PRDs are consistently accurate enough that developer review cycles are short. You are proactively designing templates across new categories and identifying where the library has gaps. The development team never waits on you.





Why This Role Matters

VidRush’s motion graphics system is what makes every AI-generated video look professionally edited rather than auto-generated. The template library is how we ensure that every channel has a unique visual identity and that YouTube’s content reviewers cannot detect a “template factory” pattern across VidRush-produced videos. Without a deep, varied, high-quality template library, VidRush cannot scale.

You are the person who designs what these templates look like and writes the documents that make them buildable. Every template in VidRush’s library starts with your work. The speed and quality of your output directly determines how fast the product improves, how distinct each channel looks, and ultimately whether VidRush can reach its target of 1,000+ production-ready templates.

If you are a motion graphics designer who thrives on volume, loves the intersection of design and technical documentation, and wants to build the visual foundation of an AI product used by tens of thousands of creators, this is the role.





How to Apply

Send your application with the following:

Your portfolio or showreel demonstrating motion graphics work (After Effects preferred).

A writing sample or example of technical documentation you have produced. If you do not have one, we will provide a short test assignment: design a simple motion graphic and write its PRD using our format.

A brief note on your availability, timezone, and how you work best in a high-output remote environment.



— VidRush AI Studios LLP

 when products should be discounted and why

title: Account Manager - Real Estate
description:
Job Title: High-Tier Account Manager (SaaS & Real Estate) – $2,000 - $5,000/mo + Bonuses

Location: Remote (Must work Canadian EST/PST Hours)

Role: Client Success, Onboarding & Growth Coaching

Industry: Real Estate Technology (SaaS)



The Mission

We are the fast-growing real estate platform in Canada. We don’t just sell software; we help real estate agents become the go to agent in their area.



We are looking for a High-Status Account Manager who can take a new client from "just signed up" to "Real Estate Pro." You aren't a support rep; you are a Growth Consultant.



The Role: Your Daily "Wins"

White-Glove Onboarding: Lead high-energy "Launch Calls" with top-producing agents. You’ll ensure their AI is trained, their branding is perfect, and they have their first "Wow" 
nt within the first 30 minutes.



Strategic Coaching: You will host group coaching sessions to ensure agents are actually using the tools to generate GCI (Gross Commission Income).



Webinar Mastery: Host weekly "Mastermind" webinars for our community to show off new features, share success stories, and keep engagement high.



Churn Defense: Monitor account health. If an agent isn't logging in, you reach out proactively to get them back on track.



Revenue Expansion: Tag-team with the Sales team to move successful agents from monthly plans to Annual Managed Territories.



Must-Have Requirements (Do not apply if you don't have these):

SaaS or Real Estate Background: You must have experience as an Account Manager for a software company OR have worked in Real Estate (ISA, Team Lead, or Admin). You must know what a "listing," "escrow," and "CRM pipeline" are.



English Mastery: Your verbal and written English must be Tier 1. You will be speaking with high-net-worth Canadian business owners daily.



The "Consultant" Voice: You can lead a meeting, handle an ego-driven agent, and pivot a conversation toward ROI.



Tech Fluency: You are comfortable with CRM logic, AI triggers, and Zoom/Webinar platforms.



Why Join Us?

High-Growth Environment: We are dominating the Canadian market and expanding fast.



Competitive Pay: We pay above-market rates for the Philippines because we expect world-class results.



Performance Bonuses: We reward retention and upsells. If our clients win, you win.



Long-Term Career: We aren't looking for a freelancer; we want a core tea
mber.



?? HOW TO APPLY (Mandatory Step)

We do not read generic resumes. To be considered, you must:

Send a Video Introduction (Loom or Google Drive link). In the video, tell us about your experience in SaaS/Real Estate and one specific time you saved a client from canceling.

Include the word "TERRITORY" in your subject line so we know you read this.

Briefly describe your experience with CRM systems and high-ticket client management.

title: Quality Assurance (QA) Tester – Real Estate CRM Platform
description:
About Us:

We are a leading real estate CRM and lead generation platform designed to help real estate professionals manage leads, nurture relationships, and close deals efficiently. Our platform offers a wide range of features, including nurturing through
, SMS, and voi
 drops, deal management, IDX websites, property alerts, and seamless integration with over 3,000 apps. We’re committed to delivering an easy-to-use, reliable platform that empowers real estate businesses across Canada and the USA.



Position Overview:

We are looking for a meticulous and detail-oriented Quality Assurance Tester to join our team. As a QA Tester, you will play a critical role in ensuring the quality, performance, and user experience of our CRM platform across multiple devices and browsers. You will review screen recordings, conduct manual testing, identify bugs, and provide feedback that will help us enhance our platform for real estate professionals.



Key Responsibilities:

Test our real estate CRM platform across different devices, browsers, and operating systems (desktop, mobile, tablets) to ensure seamless functionality and optimal user experience.

Review and analyze screen recordings and user interactions to identify issues, inconsistencies, and areas for improvement.

Perform manual testing of new features, updates, and bug fixes before deployment.

Document and report bugs and issues using project management tools (e.g., freedcamp).

Collaborate with developers, product managers, and support teams to communicate issues and ensure timely resolution.

Verify fixes and perform regression testing to ensure new updates don’t introduce new issues.

Continuously suggest improvements to enhance the platform’s performance, usability, and reliability.



Qualifications:

Proven experience as a QA Tester, preferably in SaaS or CRM platforms.

Strong knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools, and processes.

Hands-on experience with testing web applications across various devices and browsers.

Experience reviewing screen recordings and identifying UX/UI issues.

Familiarity with bug tracking and project management tools.

Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills.

Strong communication skills to effectively convey issues and suggestions to technical and non-technical teams.

Knowledge of the real estate industry or experience testing real estate platforms is a plus but not required.



Nice to Have:

Experience with automation testing tools.

Familiarity with API testing.

Basic understanding of HTML/CSS or other web technologies.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary based on experience.

Flexible remote working environment.

Opportunity to work with a dynamic and growing company in the real estate tech space.



Professional development opportunities.

How to Apply:

Please send your resume, a brief cover letter explaining why you’re a good fit for this role, and any relevant work samples.

title: Executive VA
description:
We are a boutique global consulting firm looking for a sharp, proactive Virtual Assistant to help our founder stay organized, on track, and one step ahead. We need someone who thinks ahead, notices what needs to happen before being told, and takes real ownership of their responsibilities. If you expect to be spoon fed, this is not the position for you. High quality and attention to detail are key.

This is a 3-month contract to start, with strong potential to become ongoing for the right person. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love getting things done, and know how to manage a busy executive — we want to hear from you.



Responsibilities

Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

 & Inbox Management

• Daily inbox monitoring, triage, and near-zero inbox management

• Drafting responses for approval with clear context on who is writing and why

• Proactively flagging
s that need attention and managing responses in a timely manner

Calendar & Schedule Management

• Weekly schedule overview for the following week sent to our executive every Friday

• Management of annual calendar on an ongoing basis

• Meeting memos prepared minimum 24 hours in advance

• Proactive calendar maintenance including time blocking, cleaning, re/scheduling, and conflict identification/resolution

Project & Task Support

• Asana workspace management — keeping tasks current and nothing falling through the cracks

• Deep understanding and ability to work inside LinkedIn and LISN

• Cross-team coordination to ensure work gets completed, not just assigned

• Using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) independently to research and problem-solve

Team Coordination

• Direct communication with other tea
mbers to keep work coordinated

• GoHighLevel (GHL) support including building calendar links, testing newsletters and simple automations

• LinkedIn and LinkedIn Sales Navigator DM support as directed

General Admin

• Management, support and follow-up of our executive’s task list including deadlines

• File organization in Dropbox and Google Drive

• Google Docs and Google Sheets creation and maintenance

• PDF and document formatting

• Check-in and check-out reporting at start of shift, end of shift, and breaks — including a daily end-of-shift accomplishments summary. This is non-negotiable.



Who You Are

• You are proactive — you spot what needs to happen and do it without being asked

• You communicate clearly and concisely — no screenshots with no context, no vague messages

• You think for yourself and use the tools available to you (including AI) to solve problems

• You take ownership — if something is your responsibility, it gets done

• You can manage up — you’re comfortable flagging issues, suggesting solutions, and gently pushing back when needed

• You are organized, detail-oriented, and consistent

• You handle confidential information with absolute discretion



Required Skills & Tools

• Asana — must be proficient and ideally able to set it up well

• Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) — must have Office installed on a PC (not Mac)

• Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail

• Dropbox

• GoHighLevel (GHL) — required; must be able to navigate confidently and build simple items such as calendar booking links

• AI tools — ChatGPT and/or Claude (comfortable using daily)

• WhatsApp — required for instant communication while on shift

• Backup power solution — required; power outages cannot interrupt your availability during shift hours

• Strong written English — clear, professional, and direct

• Excellent attention to detail



Compensation, Hours & Logistics

Starting rate: $6 USD/hour, with a rate review at the 3-month mark

Hours: 20 hours/week to start, with potential to go full-time for the right candidate

Timezone: Eastern Time (ET) — start time between 7:00–8:00 AM ET, to be agreed upon

Contract: 3-month initial term with strong potential for ongoing engagement

Communication: WhatsApp for daily communication; Zoom for meetings

Onboarding support will be provided

NDA required



How to Apply

Please apply with the following:

• Your resume or work history — experienced candidates only; please do not apply if this is your first VA role

• A minimum of 2 professional references who can speak to your work as a VA or in a similar role

• A brief cover letter — tell us why this role is a fit for you and give one example of a time you got ahead of something before being asked

• List the tools from our Required Skills section that you have experience with

• Confirm that you have a PC (not Mac) with Microsoft Office installed

• Tell us your favourite movie of all time and why



Applications that do not follow all instructions above will not be considered.

title: Digital Marketing Manager (2090)
description:
Are you tired of Office Politics and want to just work in a loving environment?



Do you just love to talk to people every chance you get? And love to serve customers?



We are looking for the next SUPERSTAR for our family. A caring, well-rounded tea
mber with drive & passion for adding value and being a part of a growing company.



Hi!! I am currently looking for a Digital Marketing Manager.



Are you…



- Someone with at least 3 years of relevant experience as a social media manager

- Proficient in LinkedIn: posts, articles, events, business pages

- Able to plan own work tasks and timing to meet deliverables and deadlines with excellence

- A People Person

- Persistent, aggressive, and driven

- Excellent in communication

- Speak and write Great English

- Very organized

- Very detail-oriented

- Positive attitude

- Very Resourceful

- Able to start immediately.

- Working hours vary, depending upon the client's timezone either in EST/CET

- Someone who has a minimum internet speed of at least 20mbps.



Job Description:



* Plan and present social media calendar on a quarterly and monthly basis

* Post on LinkedIn, Xing,
, and
 5 days per week and up to 2 posts per day

* Create graphics and captions that are ready for approval two weeks in advance, every beginning of the month

* Perform quality control (spelling, grammar, etc) on all graphics, captions, hashtags, and other social media assets before posting

* Publish two monthly newsletters with Mailchimp and Active Campaign, turning into a LinkedIn article and blog post on the website

* Add/edit WordPress web pages and integrate forms for sales of products online

* Set up, launch, and fill a monthly webinar including the design and execution of social media campaign

* Set up LinkedIn ‘live’ events as needed including inviting relevant contacts to the events

* Grow LinkedIn contacts by sending 100 requests per week, with agreed messaging/text

* Message 50 LinkedIn contacts per week

* Keep up with social media trends, incorporate new ideas into social media strategy, and make recommendations to business owner

* Fulfill ad hoc requests from business owner as business needs arise

* Report to the business owner at the beginning and end of each shift, provide weekly work plan in advance, and follow up with work accomplished during the week

* Learn about the client, their purpose, their vision, and their voice, to create appropriate social media content







Note: Knowledge in LinkedIn, Canva, Google Workspace, WordPress, Clickfunnels, Zoom, Active Campaign, Mailchimp, Asana, Trello, Zapier, Jotform, Stripe, Streamyard, Buffer

is preferred



If this sounds like you, then you are the one we are looking for!!



Please fill out this form: 
/42PJlzIfqZkzZOHBMSWG



Thank you GREATLY for your time & we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Amazon sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: Virtual Assistant who #Believes in Entrepreneurs | Flexible Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome VA!’ in the subject line. We’re looking for someone who’s curious, kind, takes initiative, wants to grow, and cares about being part of something meaningful. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. Please make sure to send your job application here on OnlineJobs and not via
. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! Irish #Believe
